050101.cherokee: Ꭷ ᏗᎣᏈᎵ, ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᏣᏉᏪᎳᏅᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏍᎬᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎤᎴᏅᎲ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏕᏲᏅᎢ,
050101.english: The former treatise have I made, O Theophilus, of all that Jesus began both to do and teach,
050101.phonetic: Ka Di-o-qui-li, i-gv-yi-yi tsa-quo-we-la-nv-gi ka-no-he-s-gv-gi ni-ga-dv Tsi-sa u-le-nv-hv du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv a-le du-de-yo-nv-i,

050102.cherokee: ᎬᏂ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎠᏥᏌᎳᏓᏅ, ᎦᏳᎳ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏩᏔᏅᎯ ᏧᏁᏤᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏎ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏑᏰᏛ.
050102.english: Until the day in which he was taken up, after that he through the Holy Ghost had given commandments unto the apostles whom he had chosen:
050102.phonetic: Gv-ni na-hi-yu i-ga a-tsi-sa-la-da-nv, ga-yu-la Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do u-wa-ta-nv-hi tsu-ne-tse-lv-hi ni-ge-se ge-tsi-nv-si-dv na-s-gi tsu-su-ye-dv.

050103.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎬᏃᏛ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏚᏛᏁᎴᎢ, ᎤᎩᎵᏲᏨᎯ ᏂᎨᏎᎢ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᏄᏜᏓᏏᏛᏒᎾ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᏅᎦᏍᎪᎯ ᏧᏒᎯᏛ ᎬᏩᎪᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎤᏃᎮᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏎᎢ.
050103.english: To whom also he shewed himself alive after his passion by many infallible proofs, being seen of them forty days, and speaking of the things pertaining to the kingdom of God:
050103.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-quo gv-no-dv gv-ni-ge-sv ni-du-dv-ne-le-i, u-gi-li-yo-tsv-hi ni-ge-se-i, u-tsa-ti nu-dla-si-dv-sv-na a-do-le-ho-hi-s-do-di gv-di-s-gv-i, nv-ga-s-go-hi tsu-sv-hi-dv gv-wa-go-hv-i, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv u-gv-wa-li u-no-he-lv-hi ni-ge-se-i.

050104.cherokee: ᏚᏂᎳᏫᏨᏃ ᏚᏁᏤᎴ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎤᏂᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎤᏂᎦᏘᏗᏍᏗᏱᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎤᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏍᎩᏯᏛᎦᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, [ᏚᏬᏎᎴᎢ.]
050104.english: And, being assembled together with them, commanded them that they should not depart from Jerusalem, but wait for the promise of the Father, which, saith he, ye have heard of me.
050104.phonetic: Du-ni-la-wi-tsv-no du-ne-tse-le Tsi-lu-si-li-mi u-ni-nu-go-i-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na, u-ni-ga-ti-di-s-di-yi-s-gi-ni A-ga-yv-li-ge u-du-i-s-ta-nv-i, na-s-gi s-gi-ya-dv-ga-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi, [du-wo-se-le-i.]

050105.cherokee: ᏣᏂᏰᏃ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎠᎹ ᏓᏓᏬᏍᏗᏍᎬᎩ; ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏙᏓᏰᏣᏬᏍᏔᏂ ᎢᎸᏍᎩᏉ ᎢᏳᏒᎯ.
050105.english: For John truly baptized with water; but ye shall be baptized with the Holy Ghost not many days hence.
050105.phonetic: Tsa-ni-ye-no u-do-hi-yu-hi a-ma da-da-wo-s-di-s-gv-gi; ni-hi-s-gi-ni Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do do-da-ye-tsa-wo-s-ta-ni i-lv-s-gi-quo i-yu-sv-hi.

050106.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᎾᏓᏟᏌᏅ ᎬᏩᏛᏛᏁᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎿᎭᏉᏍᎪ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎪᏢᏒ ᏙᏛᎯᏁᎵ ᎢᏏᎵ?
050106.english: When they therefore were come together, they asked of him, saying, Lord, wilt thou at this time restore again the kingdom to Israel?
050106.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-na-da-tli-sa-nv gv-wa-dv-dv-ne-i, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, hna-quo-s-go a-ye-li go-tlv-sv do-dv-hi-ne-li I-si-li?

050107.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏕᎨᏌᏗᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎢᏧᏩᏁᎵᏓᏍᏗ ᏥᏄᏩᏅ.
050107.english: And he said unto them, It is not for you to know the times or the seasons, which the Father hath put in his own power.
050107.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i; V-tla ni-hi i-tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di yi-gi i-yu a-le na-hi-yu de-ge-sa-di-sv-i, na-s-gi A-ga-yv-li-ge u-wa-sv i-tsu-wa-ne-li-da-s-di tsi-nu-wa-nv.

050108.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏓᏰᏣᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏔᏂ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᏥᎷᏤᎸᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᏍᎩᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᏧᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᏌᎺᎵᏱ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᎡᎶᎯ.
050108.english: But ye shall receive power, after that the Holy Ghost is come upon you: and ye shall be witnesses unto me both in Jerusalem, and in all Judaea, and in Samaria, and unto the uttermost part of the earth.
050108.phonetic: A-se-no da-ye-tsa-li-ni-go-hi-s-ta-ni Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do i-tsi-lu-tse-lv-ha, a-le s-gi-no-he-s-gi ge-se-s-di Tsi-lu-si-li-mi a-le ni-gv-na-dv Tsu-di-yi a-le Sa-me-li-yi a-le ni-gv-na-dv e-lo-hi.

050109.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒ, ᎠᏏᏉ ᎤᎾᎦᏙᏍᏕ ᎠᏥᏌᎳᏓᏁᎢ, ᎤᎶᎩᎸᏃ ᏭᏕᎵᏤ ᏓᏂᎧᏅᎢ.
050109.english: And when he had spoken these things, while they beheld, he was taken up; and a cloud received him out of their sight.
050109.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a nu-we-sv, a-si-quo u-na-ga-do-s-de a-tsi-sa-la-da-ne-i, u-lo-gi-lv-no wu-de-li-tse da-ni-ka-nv-i.

050110.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏉᏃ ᏭᎶᏒ ᎤᏯᏅᏒᎯ ᏫᏓᏂᎧᏁ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᏧᏁᎬ ᏧᎾᏄᏫ ᎤᎶᏗᏢ ᏚᎾᎴᏂᎴᎢ;
050110.english: And while they looked stedfastly toward heaven as he went up, behold, two men stood by them in white apparel;
050110.phonetic: A-si-quo-no wu-lo-sv u-ya-nv-sv-hi wi-da-ni-ka-ne ga-lv-la-di, gv-ni-yu-quo a-ni-ta-li a-ni-s-ga-ya tsu-ne-gv tsu-na-nu-wi u-lo-di-tlv du-na-le-ni-le-i;

050111.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ;  ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏯ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎢᏤᎯ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᏥᏙᎾᎠ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏫᏙᏥᎧᎿᎭ  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏌ ᏤᏥᏯᏅᏏ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏥᏫᎦᎶᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏅᏛᏛᏁᎵ ᏓᎦᎷᏥ ᏤᏥᎪᏩᏛ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏥᏫᎦᎶᎯ.
050111.english: Which also said, Ye men of Galilee, why stand ye gazing up into heaven? this same Jesus, which is taken up from you into heaven, shall so come in like manner as ye have seen him go into heaven.
050111.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i;  I-tsi-s-ga-ya Ge-li-li i-tse-hi, ga-do-no i-tsi-do-na-a ga-lv-la-di wi-do-tsi-ka-hna?  Na-s-gi hi-a Tsi-sa tse-tsi-ya-nv-si ga-lv-la-di tsi-wi-ga-lo-hi na-s-gi-ya nv-dv-dv-ne-li da-ga-lu-tsi tse-tsi-go-wa-dv ga-lv-la-di tsi-wi-ga-lo-hi.

050112.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏫᎤᏂᎶᏎᎢ ᎣᎵᏩ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ ᎤᏌᎯᎸ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎾᎥ ᏥᎩ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎢᎦ ᎡᏅᏍᏗ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏥᎩ.
050112.english: Then returned they unto Jerusalem from the mount called Olivet, which is from Jerusalem a sabbath day's journey.
050112.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-lu-si-li-mi wi-u-ni-lo-se-i O-li-wa tsu-do-i-dv u-sa-hi-lv u-na-da-nv-se-i, na-s-gi Tsi-lu-si-li-mi na-v tsi-gi u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv i-ga e-nv-s-di i-yv-dv tsi-gi.

050113.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏴᎸᏃ, ᎤᎾᎩᎳᏫᏎ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎧᏅᏑᎸ ᏭᏂᏴᎴᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᎠᏂᏁ ᏈᏓ ᎠᎴ ᏥᎻ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂ ᎠᎴ ᎡᏂᏗ, ᏈᎵᎩᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏓᎻ, ᏆᏓᎳᎻ ᎠᎴ ᎹᏚ, ᏥᎻᏃ ᎡᎵᏈ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᎴ ᏌᏩᏂ ᎠᏏᎶᏗ, ᏧᏓᏏᏃ ᏥᎻ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ.
050113.english: And when they were come in, they went up into an upper room, where abode both Peter, and James, and John, and Andrew, Philip, and Thomas, Bartholomew, and Matthew, James the son of Alphaeus, and Simon Zelotes, and Judas the brother of James.
050113.phonetic: U-ni-yv-lv-no, u-na-gi-la-wi-se ga-lv-la-di ka-nv-su-lv wu-ni-yv-le-i, na-hna-no a-ni-ne Qui-da a-le Tsi-mi a-le Tsa-ni a-le E-ni-di, Qui-li-gi-no a-le Da-mi, Qua-da-la-mi a-le Ma-du, Tsi-mi-no E-li-qui u-we-tsi a-le Sa-wa-ni A-si-lo-di, Tsu-da-si-no Tsi-mi di-na-da-nv-tli.

050114.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏌᏉ ᎢᎦᎦᏛ ᎾᏂᏲᎯᏍᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᎠᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏔᏲᎯᎮᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ, ᎠᎴ ᎺᎵ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏌ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ.
050114.english: These all continued with one accord in prayer and supplication, with the women, and Mary the mother of Jesus, and with his brethren.
050114.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-dv sa-quo i-ga-ga-dv na-ni-yo-hi-s-di-s-gv-na a-na-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-i a-le a-ni-ta-yo-hi-he-i, a-le na-s-quo a-ni-ge-yv, a-le Me-li Tsi-sa u-tsi, a-le Tsi-sa a-na-li-nv-tli.

050115.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏃ ᏈᏓ ᎤᎴᏁ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᏂᏅ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏚᎾᏙᎥ ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏧᏈ ᏔᎳᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ;
050115.english: And in those days Peter stood up in the midst of the disciples, and said, (the number of names together were about an hundred and twenty,)
050115.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-no Qui-da u-le-ne a-ye-li a-ni-nv a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi, na-s-gi na-ni-v du-na-do-v a-s-go-hi-tsu-qui ta-la-s-go-hi i-yv-dv ge-se-i, hi-a-no nu-we-se-i;

050116.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏯ ᏗᏓᏓᏅᏟ, ᎯᎠ ᎪᏪᎸ ᎠᏎ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏕᏫ ᎠᎰᎵ ᏧᏩᏔᏁ ᏧᏁᏤ ᏧᏓᏏ ᎠᏥᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏘᏂᏙᎸᎯ ᏥᏌ ᏥᎬᏩᏂᏱᏍᎬᎩ;
050116.english: Men and brethren, this scripture must needs have been fulfilled, which the Holy Ghost by the mouth of David spake before concerning Judas, which was guide to them that took Jesus.
050116.phonetic: I-tsi-s-ga-ya di-da-da-nv-tli, hi-a go-we-lv a-se u-do-hi-yu-di ge-sv-gi, na-s-gi Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do De-wi a-ho-li tsu-wa-ta-ne tsu-ne-tse Tsu-da-si a-tsi-no-he-s-gv-i, na-s-gi tsu-ti-ni-do-lv-hi Tsi-sa tsi-gv-wa-ni-yi-s-gv-gi;

050117.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎡᎦᎵᎪᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎨᎳᏗᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎨᏒ ᎯᎠ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
050117.english: For he was numbered with us, and had obtained part of this ministry.
050117.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no a-yv e-ga-li-go-ta-nv-hi tsi-ge-sv-gi, a-le a-ge-la-di-s-ta-nv-hi tsi-ge-sv hi-a di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i.

050118.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ ᏧᎬᏩᎳᏅᎯ ᏥᎤᏩᎯᏍᏔᏁ ᏠᎨᏏ, ᎤᏙᎠᏒᏃ ᏧᏣᎷᏘᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᎵᎩᏏ ᏥᏚᏄᎪᏤᎢ.
050118.english: Now this man purchased a field with the reward of iniquity; and falling headlong, he burst asunder in the midst, and all his bowels gushed out.
050118.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no u-s-ga-nv-tsv-i tsu-gv-wa-la-nv-hi tsi-u-wa-hi-s-ta-ne tlo-ge-si, u-do-a-sv-no tsu-tsa-lu-ti-se-i, a-le ni-ga-dv tsu-li-gi-si tsi-du-nu-go-tse-i.

050119.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏠᎨᏏ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦᏯ ᎤᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏅᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᏎᎵᏓᎹ ᏕᎤᏙᎥ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎬᏱ ᎦᏛᎦ.
050119.english: And it was known unto all the dwellers at Jerusalem; insomuch as that field is called in their proper tongue, Aceldama, that is to say, The field of blood.
050119.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no ni-ga-dv Tsi-lu-si-li-mi a-ne-hi u-na-dv-ga-nv-gi, na-s-gi-ye-no tlo-ge-si u-na-tse-li-ga-ya u-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv a-nv-di-s-gv A-se-li-da-ma de-u-do-v, na-s-gi Gi-gv-yi ga-dv-ga.

050120.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎳ ᏗᎧᏃᎩᏍᏗ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ, "ᎦᏁᎸᎢ ᏅᏔ ᏫᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᎾᎿᎭᏳᏁᎳᏕᏍᏗ;" ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏅ, "ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏩᎩᏍᏓ."
050120.english: For it is written in the book of Psalms, Let his habitation be desolate, and let no man dwell therein: and his bishoprick let another take.
050120.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no ni-gv-nv go-we-la Di-ka-no-gi-s-di go-we-li-hi, "Ga-ne-lv-i nv-ta wi-ni-ga-li-s-da, a-le tle-s-di gi-lo na-hna yu-ne-la-de-s-di;" a-le na-s-quo hi-a ni-gv-nv, "Tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv nv-wa-da-le wa-gi-s-da."

050121.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎢᎨᏙᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎢᎨᎳᏗᏙᎸᎢ,
050121.english: Wherefore of these men which have companied with us all the time that the Lord Jesus went in and out among us,
050121.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hi-a na-s-gi a-ni-s-ga-ya i-ge-do-lv-hi tsi-gi ni-go-hi-lv U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa i-ge-la-di-do-lv-i,

050122.cherokee: ᏣᏂ ᏥᏓᏓᏬᏍᎬᎢ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎬᏂ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᏣᏥᏌᎳᏓᏅ ᏤᎩᏯᏅᎡᎸᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏎ ᏌᏉ ᎠᏑᏰᏍᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎨᎳᏗᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏃᎮᏗᏱ ᏥᏌ ᏕᎤᎴᎯᏌᏅ ᎢᏗᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ.
050122.english: Beginning from the baptism of John, unto that same day that he was taken up from us, must one be ordained to be a witness with us of his resurrection.
050122.phonetic: Tsa-ni tsi-da-da-wo-s-gv-i nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv, gv-ni na-hi-yu i-ga tsa-tsi-sa-la-da-nv tse-gi-ya-nv-e-lv-gi, na-s-gi hi-a a-ni-s-ga-ya a-se sa-quo a-su-ye-s-s-di, na-s-gi i-ge-la-di-da-s-di-yi u-no-he-di-yi Tsi-sa de-u-le-hi-sa-nv i-di-no-he-s-gv-i.

050123.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏔᎵᏃ ᏚᏂᎧᏁᎢ, ᏦᏩ ᏆᏏᏆ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ, ᏣᏍᏓ ᏣᎪᏎᎰᎢ, ᎹᏓᏯᏃ.
050123.english: And they appointed two, Joseph called Barsabas, who was surnamed Justus, and Matthias.
050123.phonetic: A-ni-ta-li-no du-ni-ka-ne-i, Tso-wa Qua-si-qua tsu-do-i-dv, Tsa-s-da tsa-go-se-ho-i, Ma-da-ya-no.

050124.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏁᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᏂᎯ ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏂᎾᏫ ᏘᎦᏔᎯ, ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏅᎦ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᏯᏑᏰᏒᎢ,
050124.english: And they prayed, and said, Thou, Lord, which knowest the hearts of all men, shew whether of these two thou hast chosen,
050124.phonetic: U-na-da-do-li-s-ta-ne-no hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; Ni-hi Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, ni-ga-dv tsu-ni-na-wi ti-ga-ta-hi, gv-ni-ge-sv nv-ga na-s-gi hi-a a-ni-ta-li ge-sv na-s-gi hi-ya-su-ye-sv-i,

050125.cherokee: ᎤᏪᎳᏗᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎯᎠ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᏏ ᏥᏚᏲᏒᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ ᏭᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
050125.english: That he may take part of this ministry and apostleship, from which Judas by transgression fell, that he might go to his own place.
050125.phonetic: U-we-la-di-da-s-di-yi hi-a di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di a-le a-da-nv-si-dv ge-sv-i, na-s-gi Tsu-da-si tsi-du-yo-sv-gi u-wa-sv u-tse-li-go-hi wu-lo-hi-s-di-yi.

050126.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏚᎾᏎᏒᎮᎢ; ᎹᏓᏯᏃ ᎠᎦᏑᏰᏎᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᎨᎳᏕ ᏌᏚ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬᎢ.
050126.english: And they gave forth their lots; and the lot fell upon Matthias; and he was numbered with the eleven apostles.
050126.phonetic: Hna-quo-no du-na-se-sv-he-i; ma-da-ya-no a-ga-su-ye-se-i; a-le a-ge-la-de sa-du na-ni-v ge-tsi-nv-si-dv u-na-da-tlu-gv-i.

050201.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᏍᎦᏍᎪᎯᏁ ᎢᎦ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎲ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᏌᏉ ᎢᎦᎦᏛ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎨᎢ.
050201.english: And when the day of Pentecost was fully come, they were all with one accord in one place.
050201.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Hi-s-ga-s-go-hi-ne i-ga u-s-qua-lv-hv, ni-ga-dv sa-quo i-ga-ga-dv u-na-da-tlu-ge-i.

050202.cherokee: ᎤᏰᎶᎢᏍᏔᏁᏃ ᎤᏍᏆᏃᏴᎬ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏧᎶᏎᎢ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏃᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏣᏱᎵᏐᎢ, ᎤᎧᎵᎣᏁᏃ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏂᏅᎢ.
050202.english: And suddenly there came a sound from heaven as of a rushing mighty wind, and it filled all the house where they were sitting.
050202.phonetic: U-ye-lo-i-s-ta-ne-no u-s-qua-no-yv-gv ga-lv-la-di tsu-lo-se-i na-s-gi-ya u-no-le u-tsa-ti tsa-yi-li-so-i, u-ka-li-o-ne-no a-da-ne-lv na-hna a-ni-nv-i.

050203.cherokee: ᏚᏂᎪᎮᏃ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏧᏓᎢ ᏗᎦᏃᎦ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏂᏯᎸᏤ ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎨᏒᎢ.
050203.english: And there appeared unto them cloven tongues like as of fire, and it sat upon each of them.
050203.phonetic: Du-ni-go-he-no ta-li i-tsu-da-i di-ga-no-ga a-tsi-lv na-s-gi-ya-i, a-le na-s-gi du-ni-ya-lv-tse a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha ge-sv-i.

050204.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏚᏂᎧᎵᏤ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᎴᏅᎮ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᏧᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᏚᏂᏬᏂᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏂᏁᎢᏍᏗ ᏄᏅᏁᎲ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ.
050204.english: And they were all filled with the Holy Ghost, and began to speak with other tongues, as the Spirit gave them utterance.
050204.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no du-ni-ka-li-tse Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do, a-le u-na-le-nv-he nv-wa-na-da-le tsu-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di du-ni-wo-ni-se-i, na-s-gi gv-wa-ni-ne-i-s-di nu-nv-ne-hv A-da-nv-do.

050205.cherokee: ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻᏃ ᎠᏁᏙᎮ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏂᎾᏰᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᏳᏂᎶᏒᎯ ᏄᎾᏓᎴᏒ ᎠᏁᎲ ᏴᏫ ᎦᎸᎶ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ.
050205.english: And there were dwelling at Jerusalem Jews, devout men, out of every nation under heaven.
050205.phonetic: Tsi-lu-si-li-mi-no a-ne-do-he A-ni-tsu-si U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ni-na-ye-s-gi nv-da-yu-ni-lo-sv-hi nu-na-da-le-sv a-ne-hv yv-wi ga-lv-lo ha-wi-ni-di-tlv.

050206.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᎵᏙᎸ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏚᏂᎳᏫᏤᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏕᏯᏔᏁᎴᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᏓᎾᏛᎦᏁᎲ ᏓᏂᏬᏂᏍᎬ ᏗᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᏧᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
050206.english: Now when this was noised abroad, the multitude came together, and were confounded, because that every man heard them speak in his own language.
050206.phonetic: Hna-quo-no na-s-gi u-ni-no-he-li-do-lv u-ni-tsa-ti du-ni-la-wi-tse-i a-le u-na-de-ya-ta-ne-le-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge da-na-dv-ga-ne-hv da-ni-wo-ni-s-gv di-ni-si-yv-wi-ha tsu-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv-i.

050207.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏎᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᎾᏓᏪᏎᎴᎢ; Ᏺ!  ᏝᏍᎪ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎯᎠ ᏣᏂᏬᏂᎭ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎠᏁᎯ ᏱᎩ?
050207.english: And they were all amazed and marvelled, saying one to another, Behold, are not all these which speak Galilaeans?
050207.phonetic: A-le ni-ga-dv u-tsa-ta-nv-hi u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-se-i, hi-a ni-du-na-da-we-se-le-i; Yo!  tla-s-go ni-ga-dv hi-a tsa-ni-wo-ni-ha Ge-li-li a-ne-hi yi-gi?

050208.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ ᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏥᏕᏓᏛᎩᎠ ᏗᏗᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᏕᎦᏛᏒ ᏗᎩᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ?
050208.english: And how hear we every man in our own tongue, wherein we were born?
050208.phonetic: Ga-do-no di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha tsi-de-da-dv-gi-a di-di-si-yv-wi-ha de-ga-dv-sv di-gi-wo-ni-hi-s-di?

050209.cherokee: ᏆᏗᏱ ᎢᏕᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎻᏗᏱ ᎢᏕᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎢᎳᎻᏱ ᎢᏕᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎺᏌᏆᏕᎻ ᎢᏕᎯ, ᏧᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎨᏆᏙᏏ ᎢᏕᎯ, ᏋᏗᏱᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎡᏏᏱ ᎢᏕᎯ,
050209.english: Parthians, and Medes, and Elamites, and the dwellers in Mesopotamia, and in Judaea, and Cappadocia, in Pontus, and Asia,
050209.phonetic: Qua-di-yi i-de-hi a-le Mi-di-yi i-de-hi a-le I-la-mi-yi i-de-hi a-le Me-sa-qua-de-mi i-de-hi, Tsu-di-yi a-le Ge-qua-do-si i-de-hi, Quv-di-yi-no a-le E-si-yi i-de-hi,

050210.cherokee: ᏈᏥᏱᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏆᎢᏈᎵᏱ ᎢᏕᎯ, ᎢᏥᏈᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎵᏈᏱ ᏌᎵᏂ ᎤᏚᏫᏛ ᎢᏕᎯ, ᎢᏕᏙᎯᏃ ᎶᎻ ᎢᏕᎯ, ᎢᏗᏧᏏ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᏗᏓᎵᎪᏁᎸᎯ,
050210.english: Phrygia, and Pamphylia, in Egypt, and in the parts of Libya about Cyrene, and strangers of Rome, Jews and proselytes,
050210.phonetic: Qui-tsi-yi-no a-le Qua-i-qui-li-yi i-de-hi, I-tsi-qui-no a-le Li-qui-yi Sa-li-ni u-du-wi-dv i-de-hi, i-de-do-hi-no Lo-mi i-de-hi, I-di-tsu-si a-le A-ni-tsu-si di-da-li-go-ne-lv-hi,

050211.cherokee: ᎩᎵᏗᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎴᏈᏱ ᎢᏕᎯ, ᎢᏓᏛᎩᎭ ᏗᎩᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏂᏬᏂᏍᎬᎢ, ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏳ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ.
050211.english: Cretes and Arabians, we do hear them speak in our tongues the wonderful works of God.
050211.phonetic: Gi-li-di-no a-le A-le-qui-yi i-de-hi, i-da-dv-gi-ha di-gi-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv a-ni-wo-ni-s-gv-i, u-s-qua-ni-go-di-yu U-ne-la-nv-hi du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv a-ni-no-he-s-gv-i.

050212.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏎᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏖᏔᏁᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᎾᏓᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᎯᎠ ᎦᏛᎦ?
050212.english: And they were all amazed, and were in doubt, saying one to another, What meaneth this?
050212.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-se-i a-le u-na-da-nv-te-ta-ne-i, hi-a ni-du-na-da-we-se-le-i, Ga-do hi-a ga-dv-ga?

050213.cherokee: ᎢᎦᏛᏃ ᏓᎾᏕᎰᏗᏍᎬ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᎢᏤ ᎩᎦᎨ-ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᏚᏂᎧᎵᏨ.
050213.english: Others mocking said, These men are full of new wine.
050213.phonetic: I-ga-dv-no da-na-de-ho-di-s-gv hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; I-tse gi-ga-ge--a-di-ta-s-di du-ni-ka-li-tsv.

050214.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏈᏓ ᏌᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎠᏂᏙᎾᎥ ᎦᏙᎬᎢ, ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᎤᏁᏤ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏯ ᎢᏥᏧᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎢᏤᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏅᏖᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏛᏓᏍᏓ ᏥᏁᎬᎢ.
050214.english: But Peter, standing up with the eleven, lifted up his voice, and said unto them, Ye men of Judaea, and all ye that dwell at Jerusalem, be this known unto you, and hearken to my words:
050214.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Qui-da sa-du i-ya-ni-dv a-ni-do-na-v ga-do-gv-i, a-s-da-ya u-ne-tse hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i; I-tsi-s-ga-ya i-tsi-tsu-si, a-le ni-ga-dv Tsi-lu-si-li-mi i-tse-hi, hi-a na-s-gi i-tsa-nv-te-s-di, a-le i-tsa-dv-da-s-da tsi-ne-gv-i.

050215.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏚᏂᏴᏍᏕᎭ ᏚᏂᏴᏍᏕᎭ ᏥᏤᎵᎭ, ᎠᏏᏰᏃ ᏐᎣᏁᎳᏉ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎧᎳᏩᏗᏒᎢ.
050215.english: For these are not drunken, as ye suppose, seeing it is but the third hour of the day.
050215.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no hi-a yi-du-ni-yv-s-de-ha du-ni-yv-s-de-ha tsi-tse-li-ha, a-si-ye-no so-o-ne-la-quo i-yu-tli-lo-dv ka-la-wa-di-sv-i.

050216.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎠ ᏦᎢᎵ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏧᏁᏤᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏪᏎᎢ;
050216.english: But this is that which was spoken by the prophet Joel;
050216.phonetic: Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni hi-a Tso-i-li a-do-le-ho-s-gi tsu-ne-tse-i, hi-a tsi-nu-we-se-i;

050217.cherokee: "ᎯᎠᏃ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏗᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏙ ᏓᏥᏯᏐᏅᏰᎵ, ᏗᏤᏥᏃ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏤᏥ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᏂᏫᏅᏃ ᏗᏣᏤᎵ ᎤᎾᏁᎳᏫᏎᎮᏍᏗ, ᏧᎾᏛᏐᏅᎯᏃ ᏗᏣᏤᎵ ᎠᎾᏍᎩᏓᏒᎥᏍᎨᏍᏗ;
050217.english: And it shall come to pass in the last days, saith God, I will pour out of my Spirit upon all flesh: and your sons and your daughters shall prophesy, and your young men shall see visions, and your old men shall dream dreams:
050217.phonetic: "Hi-a-no nv-da-ga-li-s-ta-ni u-li-s-qua-lv-di ge-se-s-di a-di-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi, ni-ga-v u-que-da-li ge-sv a-qua-da-nv-do da-tsi-ya-so-nv-ye-li, di-tse-tsi-no a-ni-s-ga-ya a-le di-tse-tsi a-ni-ge-yv a-na-do-le-ho-s-ge-s-di, a-ni-wi-nv-no di-tsa-tse-li u-na-ne-la-wi-se-he-s-di, tsu-na-dv-so-nv-hi-no di-tsa-tse-li a-na-s-gi-da-sv-v-s-ge-s-di;

050218.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏙ ᏓᎦᏥᏯᏐᏅᏰᎵ ᎦᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ, ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎨᏍᏗᏃ.
050218.english: And on my servants and on my handmaidens I will pour out in those days of my Spirit; and they shall prophesy:
050218.phonetic: A-le na-hi-yu a-qua-da-nv-do da-ga-tsi-ya-so-nv-ye-li ga-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di a-ni-s-ga-ya a-le a-ni-ge-yv, a-na-do-le-ho-s-ge-s-di-no.

050219.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᎦᎸᎶ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᏥᎾᏄᎪᏫᏏ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎡᎳᏗ, ᎩᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎦᏒᏍᏗ.
050219.english: And I will shew wonders in heaven above, and signs in the earth beneath; blood, and fire, and vapour of smoke:
050219.phonetic: A-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di ga-lv-lo ga-lv-la-di da-tsi-na-nu-go-wi-si a-le u-ye-lv-dv e-lo-hi e-la-di, gi-gv a-le a-tsi-lv a-le tsu-ga-sv-s-di.

050220.cherokee: ᏅᏙ ᎢᎦ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎵᏏᎩᏳ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂ, ᏅᏙᏃ ᏒᏃᏱ ᎡᎯ ᎩᎬ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂ, ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎯᏕᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏳ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
050220.english: The sun shall be turned into darkness, and the moon into blood, before that great and notable day of the Lord come:
050220.phonetic: Nv-do i-ga e-hi u-li-si-gi-yu nv-da-ga-li-s-ta-ni, nv-do-no sv-no-yi e-hi gi-gv nv-da-ga-li-s-ta-ni, u-s-qua-lv-hi-de-na ge-se-s-di na-hi-yu i-ga ga-lv-quo-di-yu a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di-yu Yi-ho-wa u-tse-li-ga.

050221.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏂᎥᏉ ᎩᎶ ᎠᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎠᏅᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏔᏲᎯᎮᏍᏗ ᎨᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ."
050221.english: And it shall come to pass, that whosoever shall call on the name of the Lord shall be saved.
050221.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-ga-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di, na-ni-v-quo gi-lo a-na-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi du-do-v a-nv-di-s-ge-s-di a-ni-ta-yo-hi-he-s-di ge-tsi-s-de-lv-di ge-se-s-di."

050222.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏯ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎢᏣᏛᏓᏍᏓ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏁᎬᎢ.  ᏥᏌ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᎡᎯ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᎸᎯ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏓᎴᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏰᎸᏛᎢ ᏥᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎩ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᏥᎦᏔᎭ,
050222.english: Ye men of Israel, hear these words; Jesus of Nazareth, a man approved of God among you by miracles and wonders and signs, which God did by him in the midst of you, as ye yourselves also know:
050222.phonetic: I-tsi-s-ga-ya I-si-li tsu-we-tsi i-tsa-dv-da-s-da hi-a tsi-ne-gv-i.  Tsi-sa Na-se-li-di e-hi tsi-ge-sv-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-wa-ne-lv-hi i-tse-hv-i, na-s-gi u-wa-di-s-gv u-da-le-hi a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di a-le u-ye-lv-dv-i tsi-du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-gi i-tse-hv-i, na-s-gi ni-hi na-s-quo tsi-tsi-ga-ta-ha,

050223.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎬᏩᎪᎲᎯ ᏥᏂᎨᏎᎢ ᏥᏚᏲᏎᎢ, ᏂᎯ ᎡᏥᏂᏴᎲ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏍᎦᎾ ᏗᏦᏰᏂ ᏕᏨᏔᏅ ᎡᏣᏛᏅ ᎠᎴ ᎡᏥᎸ.
050223.english: Him, being delivered by the determinate counsel and foreknowledge of God, ye have taken, and by wicked hands have crucified and slain:
050223.phonetic: Na-s-gi, U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-nv-te-lv-hi a-le ga-yu-la gv-wa-go-hv-hi tsi-ni-ge-se-i tsi-du-yo-se-i, ni-hi e-tsi-ni-yv-hv a-le di-s-ga-na di-tso-ye-ni de-tsv-ta-nv e-tsa-dv-nv a-le e-tsi-lv.

050224.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏕᎤᎴᏔᏅ, ᏕᎤᎦᎵᏒ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᎤᏪᎲᎢ, ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏴᎵ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏂᏴᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ.
050224.english: Whom God hath raised up, having loosed the pains of death: because it was not possible that he should be holden of it.
050224.phonetic: Na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi de-u-le-ta-nv, de-u-ga-li-sv a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv e-hi-s-di u-we-hv-i, v-tla-ye-no yv-li ni-go-hi-lv na-s-gi gv-wa-ni-yv-di yi-ge-se-i.

050225.cherokee: ᏕᏫᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ; "ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᏥᎪᏩᏘᏍᎬᎩ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎢᎬᏱᏢ ᎠᏆᎧᏛᎢ, ᏥᎦᏘᏏᏗᏢᏰᏃ ᎦᏙᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᎩᏖᎸᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
050225.english: For David speaketh concerning him, I foresaw the Lord always before my face, for he is on my right hand, that I should not be moved:
050225.phonetic: De-wi-ye-no hi-a ni-ga-we na-s-gi ka-no-he-s-gv-i; "Ni-go-hi-lv tsi-go-wa-ti-s-gv-gi Yi-ho-wa i-gv-yi-tlv a-qua-ka-dv-i, tsi-ga-ti-si-di-tlv-ye-no ga-do-ga, na-s-gi v-gi-te-lv-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na.

050226.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᎩᎾᏫ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏓᏅᏓᏛᎩ, ᏥᏃᎦᏃ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᎬᎩ, ᎾᏍᏉᏃ ᎠᎩᏇᏓᎸ ᏓᏳᏯᏪᏐᎵ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎬᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
050226.english: Therefore did my heart rejoice, and my tongue was glad; moreover also my flesh shall rest in hope:
050226.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-gi-na-wi o-si-yu u-da-nv-da-dv-gi, tsi-no-ga-no a-li-he-li-gv-gi, na-s-quo-no a-gi-que-da-lv da-yu-ya-we-so-li u-du-gi gv-di ge-sv-i;

050227.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏙ ᏫᏱᏙᎦᎯᏲᎯ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎪᎯ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᏣᏤᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏭᎪᎯ ᎦᎯᏰᎵᏎᏗ ᏱᎩ.
050227.english: Because thou wilt not leave my soul in hell, neither wilt thou suffer thine Holy One to see corruption.
050227.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no a-qua-da-nv-do wi-yi-do-ga-hi-yo-hi tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi u-na-tse-li-go-hi, v-tla a-le na-s-ga-nv-na tsa-tse-li u-ne-la-gi wu-go-hi ga-hi-ye-li-se-di yi-gi.

050228.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏛ ᏕᎦᏅᏅ ᏕᏍᎩᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎸ, ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏓᏍᎩᎧᎵᎢᏍᏔᏂ ᏣᎧᏛ ᏛᏔᏂ."
050228.english: Thou hast made known to me the ways of life; thou shalt make me full of joy with thy countenance.
050228.phonetic: Gv-ni-dv de-ga-nv-nv de-s-gi-na-nu-go-wi-se-lv, a-li-he-li-s-di ge-sv da-s-gi-ka-li-i-s-ta-ni tsa-ka-dv dv-ta-ni."

050229.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏯ ᎢᏓᏓᏅᏟ ᏂᏥᏍᎦᎢᎲᎾ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏕᏫ ᎢᏨᏃᎮᎯᏏ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᏂᏌᏅᎢ, ᎤᏤᎵᏃ ᎠᏤᎵᏍᏛ ᎠᏏ ᎪᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎢᎦᏓᏑᏴᎢ.
050229.english: Men and brethren, let me freely speak unto you of the patriarch David, that he is both dead and buried, and his sepulchre is with us unto this day.
050229.phonetic: I-tsi-s-ga-ya i-da-da-nv-tli ni-tsi-s-ga-i-hv-na a-ga-yv-li-ge De-wi i-tsv-no-he-hi-si, na-s-gi u-yo-hu-sv-i a-le a-tsi-ni-sa-nv-i, u-tse-li-no a-tse-li-s-dv a-si go-hi tsi-gi i-ga-da-su-yv-i.

050230.cherokee: ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏔᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏎᎵᏔᏅ ᎤᏁᏤᎸᎢ, ᎠᏰᎵ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᏗᏱ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᏅ ᎤᏪᏗᏱ,
050230.english: Therefore being a prophet, and knowing that God had sworn with an oath to him, that of the fruit of his loins, according to the flesh, he would raise up Christ to sit on his throne;
050230.phonetic: A-do-le-ho-s-gi-s-gi-ni ge-sv i-yu-s-di, a-le a-ga-ta-hi-yu ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-se-li-ta-nv u-ne-tse-lv-i, a-ye-li u-que-da-li ge-sv u-na-nu-go-wi-s-di-yi Ga-lo-ne-dv, na-s-gi u-we-nv u-we-di-yi,

050231.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎬᎢ ᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏁᎢ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏧᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏃᎮᎴᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᏫᏂᏓᏥᏲᎯᏎᎸᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎪᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᏄᎪᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
050231.english: He seeing this before spake of the resurrection of Christ, that his soul was not left in hell, neither his flesh did see corruption.
050231.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a a-do-le-ho-s-gv-i nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-ne-i, Ga-lo-ne-dv tsu-le-hi-so-di ge-sv u-no-he-le-i, na-s-gi u-da-nv-do wi-ni-da-tsi-yo-hi-se-lv-na ge-sv tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi u-na-tse-li-go-hi, a-le na-s-gi u-que-da-li nu-go-sv-na ge-sv-i.

050232.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏕᎤᎴᏔᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎣᏥᏃᎮᏍᎩ.
050232.english: This Jesus hath God raised up, whereof we all are witnesses.
050232.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a Tsi-sa U-ne-la-nv-hi de-u-le-ta-nv, a-le na-s-gi a-yv ni-ga-dv o-tsi-no-he-s-gi.

050233.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏘᏏ ᎤᏬᏰᏂ ᎤᏩᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏌᎳᏓᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎤᏚᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏁᏗᏱ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏪᏐᏅᏴ ᎯᎠ ᎪᎯ ᏥᏥᎪᏩᏘᎭ ᎠᎴ ᏥᏣᏛᎩᎭ.
050233.english: Therefore being by the right hand of God exalted, and having received of the Father the promise of the Holy Ghost, he hath shed forth this, which ye now see and hear.
050233.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ti-si u-wo-ye-ni u-wa-ta-nv-hi u-sa-la-da-nv-hi ge-sv-i, a-le A-ga-yv-li-ge u-du-i-s-da-ne-lv-hi ge-sv tsu-ne-di-yi Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do u-we-so-nv-yv hi-a go-hi tsi-tsi-go-wa-ti-ha a-le tsi-tsa-dv-gi-ha.

050234.cherokee: ᏕᏫᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏳᎵᏌᎳᏓᏅ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏫᏳᎶᏒ, ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᏪ ᎤᏩᏒ; "ᏱᎰᏩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏆᏤᎵᎦ; ᏥᎦᏘᏏ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏦᎴᏍᏗ,
050234.english: For David is not ascended into the heavens: but he saith himself, The LORD said unto my Lord, Sit thou on my right hand,
050234.phonetic: De-wi-ye-no v-tla yu-li-sa-la-da-nv ga-lv-la-di wi-yu-lo-sv, hi-a-ye-no ni-ga-we u-wa-sv; "Yi-ho-wa hi-a nu-we-se-lv U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-qua-tse-li-ga; Tsi-ga-ti-si i-di-tlv tso-le-s-di,

050235.english: Until I make thy foes thy footstool.

050236.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎢᏏᎢ ᏏᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒ ᏩᎾᏙᎴᎰᎯ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏄᏩᏁᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᏂᎯ ᏤᏣᏛᏅᎩ.
050236.english: Therefore let all the house of Israel know assuredly, that God hath made that same Jesus, whom ye have crucified, both Lord and Christ.
050236.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di na-ni-v I-si-i si-da-ne-lv-hi ge-sv u-do-hi-yu-sv wa-na-do-le-ho-hi, U-ne-la-nv-hi U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-le Ga-lo-ne-dv nu-wa-ne-lv na-s-gi Tsi-sa ni-hi tse-tsa-dv-nv-gi.

050237.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ ᏧᏂᎾᏫᏱ ᏚᏂᏣᏲᎴᎢ; ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏂᏪᏎᎴ ᏈᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ; ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏯ ᎢᏓᏓᏅᏟ, ᎦᏙ ᏓᏲᏣᏛᏁᎵ?
050237.english: Now when they heard this, they were pricked in their heart, and said unto Peter and to the rest of the apostles, Men and brethren, what shall we do?
050237.phonetic: Hna-quo-no na-s-gi u-na-dv-ga-nv tsu-ni-na-wi-yi du-ni-tsa-yo-le-i; hi-a-no ni-du-ni-we-se-le Qui-da a-le a-ni-so-i ge-tsi-nv-si-dv; I-tsi-s-ga-ya i-da-da-nv-tli, ga-do da-yo-tsa-dv-ne-li?

050238.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏂᏥᎥ ᏗᏥᏁᏟᏴᎾ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏫᏕᏣᏬᏣ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏕᎤᏙᏍᏛᎢ, ᎡᏥᏙᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ; ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏓᏰᏥᏁᎵ.
050238.english: Then Peter said unto them, Repent, and be baptized every one of you in the name of Jesus Christ for the remission of sins, and ye shall receive the gift of the Holy Ghost.
050238.phonetic: Qui-da-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i; Ni-tsi-v di-tsi-ne-tli-yv-na de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i, a-le wi-de-tsa-wo-tsa, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv de-u-do-s-dv-i, e-tsi-do-li-s-di-yi i-tsi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i; Ga-lv-quo-di-yu-no A-da-nv-do da-ye-tsi-ne-li.

050239.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᎡᏥᏚᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏤᏥ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎢᏅ ᏗᏁᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᏧᏯᏅᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
050239.english: For the promise is unto you, and to your children, and to all that are afar off, even as many as the Lord our God shall call.
050239.phonetic: Ni-hi-ye-no e-tsi-du-i-s-da-ne-lv-hi a-le di-tse-tsi a-le na-ni-v i-nv di-ne-hi, na-s-gi na-ni-v U-gv-wi-yu-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi i-ga-tse-li tsu-ya-nv-di ge-sv-i.

050240.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏖ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎢᎧᏁᏨᎯ ᏚᏬᏁᏔᏁᎢ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᏗᏣᎵᏏ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎢᏯᎾᏛᏁᎯ ᏣᏁᎭ.
050240.english: And with many other words did he testify and exhort, saying, Save yourselves from this untoward generation.
050240.phonetic: A-le u-tsa-te u-tli i-ga-i i-ka-ne-tsv-hi du-wo-ne-ta-ne-i hi-a nu-we-se-i; Di-tsa-li-si hi-a ni-du-yu-go-dv-na i-ya-na-dv-ne-hi tsa-ne-ha.

050241.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏨᎯ ᏗᎬᏩᏓᏂᎸᏤᎯ ᏕᎨᎦᏬᎡᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳᏃ ᎢᎦ ᎤᏂᏁᏉᏤ ᏦᎢ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎢᏴᏛ.
050241.english: Then they that gladly received his word were baptized: and the same day there were added unto them about three thousand souls.
050241.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-ne-tsv u-li-he-li-tsv-hi di-gv-wa-da-ni-lv-tse-hi de-ge-ga-wo-e-i, na-hi-yu-no i-ga u-ni-ne-quo-tse tso-i i-ya-ga-yv-li i-yv-dv.

050242.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᏓᎾᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᎵᎪᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏚ ᎠᏂᎬᎭᎷᏯᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
050242.english: And they continued stedfastly in the apostles' doctrine and fellowship, and in breaking of bread, and in prayers.
050242.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no u-li-ni-gi-di-yu du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he ge-tsi-nv-si-dv da-na-de-yo-hv-s-gv-i, a-le u-na-li-go-sv-i, a-le ga-du a-ni-gv-ha-lu-ya-s-gv-i, a-le a-na-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv-i.

050243.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗᏳ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏓᏕᎢ, ᎤᏣᏖᏃ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ.
050243.english: And fear came upon every soul: and many wonders and signs were done by the apostles.
050243.phonetic: Na-ni-v-no yv-wi u-na-ye-hi-s-di-yu u-na-da-nv-da-de-i, u-tsa-te-no tsu-da-le-nv-dv u-s-qua-ni-go-di a-le u-ye-lv-dv du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he ge-tsi-nv-si-dv.

050244.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏃ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏰᎵᏉ ᏄᏅᏁ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᏂᎲᎢ;
050244.english: And all that believed were together, and had all things common;
050244.phonetic: Na-ni-v-no a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi u-na-da-tlu-ge-i, a-le a-ye-li-quo nu-nv-ne ni-ga-v tsu-gv-wa-lo-di u-ni-hv-i;

050245.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏓᏂᎾᏕᎨ ᏚᏂᎶᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᏂᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏂᏯᏙᎮᎮ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏂᏂᎬᏎᎲᎢ.
050245.english: And sold their possessions and goods, and parted them to all men, as every man had need.
050245.phonetic: A-le da-ni-na-de-ge du-ni-lo-ge-sv a-le tsu-gv-wa-lo-di u-ni-hv-i, a-le da-ni-ya-do-he-he na-ni-v na-s-gi-ya u-ni-ni-gv-se-hv-i.

050246.cherokee: ᏂᏚᎩᏨᏂᏒᏃ ᏌᏉ ᎢᎦᎦᏛ ᎠᏁᏙᎮ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏚ ᎠᏂᎬᎭᎷᏯᏍᎨ ᏓᏓᏁᎳᏗᏒᎢ, ᏓᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎨ ᎠᎾᎵᎮᎵᎨ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᏄᏓᏑᏴᎾ ᎨᏎ ᏧᏂᎾᏫᏱ,
050246.english: And they, continuing daily with one accord in the temple, and breaking bread from house to house, did eat their meat with gladness and singleness of heart,
050246.phonetic: Ni-du-gi-tsv-ni-sv-no sa-quo i-ga-ga-dv a-ne-do-he u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-le ga-du a-ni-gv-ha-lu-ya-s-ge da-da-ne-la-di-sv-i, da-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-ge a-na-li-he-li-ge a-le u-tlo-na-s-di nu-da-su-yv-na ge-se tsu-ni-na-wi-yi,

050247.cherokee: ᎠᏂᎸᏉᏗᏍᎨ ᎤᏂᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ ᎬᏫᏂᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏎᎢ.  ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏃ ᏂᏚᎩᏨᏂᏒ ᎤᎾᎵᎪᏒ ᏕᎠᎵᎪᏗᏍᎨ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
050247.english: Praising God, and having favour with all the people. And the Lord added to the church daily such as should be saved.
050247.phonetic: A-ni-lv-quo-di-s-ge U-ni-la-nv-hi, a-le na-ni-v yv-wi gv-wi-ni-ge-yu-hi-yu ge-se-i.  U-gv-wi-yu-hi-no ni-du-gi-tsv-ni-sv u-na-li-go-sv de-a-li-go-di-s-ge na-s-gi ge-tsi-s-de-lv-di ge-sv-i.

050301.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎤᏁᏅᎭ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎢ, ᏦᎢᏁ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎧᎳᏩᏗᏒᎢ.
050301.english: Now Peter and John went up together into the temple at the hour of prayer, being the ninth hour.
050301.phonetic: Qui-da-no a-le Tsa-ni i-tsu-la-ha u-ne-nv-ha u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-da-do-li-s-do-di-yi ge-sv i-yu-i, tso-i-ne i-yu-tli-lo-dv ka-la-wa-di-sv-i.

050302.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏲᎤᎵ ᏂᎨᏎ ᎤᏕᏅ-ᎠᏥᏁᎨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏚᎩᏨᏂᏒ ᎠᏂᎧᎲᏍᎨ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏳᎶᏗ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏬᏚᎯ ᏥᏕᎤᏙᎥ, ᏧᏚᎳᏕᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏎ ᎠᏂᏴᎯᎯ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ.
050302.english: And a certain man lame from his mother's womb was carried, whom they laid daily at the gate of the temple which is called Beautiful, to ask alms of them that entered into the temple;
050302.phonetic: Gi-lo-no i-yu-s-di a-s-ga-ya a-yo-u-li ni-ge-se u-de-nv--a-tsi-ne-ge-i, na-s-gi ni-du-gi-tsv-ni-sv a-ni-ka-hv-s-ge ga-lo-hi-s-di-yu-lo-di u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi na-s-gi ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi U-wo-du-hi tsi-de-u-do-v, tsu-du-la-de-di-yi u-ni-ye-lv-se a-ni-yv-hi-hi u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi.

050303.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎤᎪᎲ ᏈᏓ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏗᏂᏴᎵᏎ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᏚᏚᎳᏕᎴᎢ.
050303.english: Who seeing Peter and John about to go into the temple asked an alms.
050303.phonetic: Na-s-gi de-u-go-hv Qui-da a-le Tsa-ni hna-quo di-ni-yv-li-se u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, du-du-la-de-le-i.

050304.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ ᎤᏯᏅᏒᎯ ᏚᎧᎿᎭᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏣᏂ; ᏈᏓᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏗᏍᎩᎾᎦᏅᎦ.
050304.english: And Peter, fastening his eyes upon him with John, said, Look on us.
050304.phonetic: Qui-da-no u-ya-nv-sv-hi du-ka-hna-ne-i, a-le na-s-quo Tsa-ni; Qui-da-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, Di-s-gi-na-ga-nv-ga.

050305.english: And he gave heed unto them, expecting to receive something of them.

050306.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏈᏓ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎠᏕᎸ ᎤᏂᏁᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏓᎶᏂᎨ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏓᎩᎭ, ᎢᏳᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎠᎩᎲ ᎬᎥᏏ; ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᏤᎲ ᏕᎤᏙᏍᏛ ᏔᎴᎲᎦ ᎠᎴ ᎮᏓ.
050306.english: Then Peter said, Silver and gold have I none; but such as I have give I thee: In the name of Jesus Christ of Nazareth rise up and walk.
050306.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Qui-da hi-a nu-we-se-i; A-de-lv u-ni-ne-gv a-le a-de-lv da-lo-ni-ge v-tla yi-da-gi-ha, i-yu-s-di-s-gi-ni-no-nv a-gi-hv gv-v-si; Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv Na-se-li-di tse-hv de-u-do-s-dv ta-le-hv-ga a-le he-da.

050307.cherokee: ᎠᎦᏘᏏᏃ ᎤᏬᏯᏁᏒ ᏕᎤᎴᏔᏁᎢ; ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏧᎳᏏᏕᏂ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏓᏆᎵᎢ ᏧᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᏂᏚᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ.
050307.english: And he took him by the right hand, and lifted him up: and immediately his feet and ankle bones received strength.
050307.phonetic: A-ga-ti-si-no u-wo-ya-ne-sv de-u-le-ta-ne-i; gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv tsu-la-si-de-ni a-le di-da-qua-li-i tsu-li-ni-gi-di-yu ni-du-li-s-ta-ne-i.

050308.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏚᎵᏔᏗᏅᏎᎢ, ᎤᎴᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᏙᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏭᏂᏴᎴ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎡᏙᎮᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎵᏔᏕᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏍᎨ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
050308.english: And he leaping up stood, and walked, and entered with them into the temple, walking, and leaping, and praising God.
050308.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no du-li-ta-di-nv-se-i, u-le-ne-i, a-le u-we-do-le-i, a-le i-tsu-la-ha wu-ni-yv-le u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, e-do-he-i, a-le da-li-ta-de-ge-i, a-le ga-lv-quo-di-s-ge U-ne-la-nv-hi.

050309.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎬᏩᎪᎮ ᎡᏙᎲᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
050309.english: And all the people saw him walking and praising God:
050309.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no yv-wi gv-wa-go-he e-do-hv-i a-le ga-lv-quo-di-s-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi.

050310.cherokee: ᎬᏬᎵᏤᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏚᎳᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᏧᏰᎸᏎ ᏥᎦᎲᏍᎨ ᎤᏬᏚᎯ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ.  ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯᏃ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏎ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ.
050310.english: And they knew that it was he which sat for alms at the Beautiful gate of the temple: and they were filled with wonder and amazement at that which had happened unto him.
050310.phonetic: Gv-wo-li-tse-no na-s-gi ge-sv u-du-la-di-s-di-yi tsu-ye-lv-se tsi-ga-hv-s-ge u-wo-du-hi ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi.  U-tsa-ta-nv-hi-no u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-se nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge na-s-gi nu-li-s-da-ne-lv-i.

050311.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏉᏃ ᎠᏥᏅᏩᏅᎯ ᎠᏲᎤᎵ ᏕᎤᏂᏴᏎ ᏈᏓ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏕᎬᏩᏂᏔᏫᏤ ᎠᏲᏓᏝᎲᎢ ᏐᎵᎹᏅ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏥᏕᎤᏙᎥ, ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏍᎨᎢ.
050311.english: And as the lame man which was healed held Peter and John, all the people ran together unto them in the porch that is called Solomon's, greatly wondering.
050311.phonetic: A-si-quo-no a-tsi-nv-wa-nv-hi a-yo-u-li de-u-ni-yv-se Qui-da a-le Tsa-ni, ni-ga-dv yv-wi de-gv-wa-ni-ta-wi-tse a-yo-da-tla-hv-i So-li-ma-nv u-tse-li tsi-de-u-do-v, u-tsa-ta-nv-hi u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-s-ge-i.

050312.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᏴᏫ; ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏯ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏧᏪᏥ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏍᎦ ᎯᎠ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙᏃ ᎤᏯᏅᏒᎯ ᏙᏍᎩᎾᎦᏂᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎣᎩᏅᏒ ᏙᎩᎾᎵᏂᎬᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏙᏏᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏦᎩᏅᏔᏃᎢ ᎯᎠ ᎬᏪᏓᏍᏗ ᏥᏃᏍᏛᏁᎶᎢ.
050312.english: And when Peter saw it, he answered unto the people, Ye men of Israel, why marvel ye at this? or why look ye so earnestly on us, as though by our own power or holiness we had made this man to walk?
050312.phonetic: Qui-da-no u-do-le-ho-sv hi-a ni-du-we-se-le yv-wi; I-tsi-s-ga-ya I-si-li tsu-we-tsi, ga-do-no i-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-s-ga hi-a, a-le ga-do-no u-ya-nv-sv-hi do-s-gi-na-ga-ni-ha, na-s-gi-ya o-gi-nv-sv do-gi-na-li-ni-gv-gv a-le o-s-do-si-yu ge-sv tso-gi-nv-ta-no-i hi-a gv-we-da-s-di tsi-no-s-dv-ne-lo-i.

050313.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᏏᎩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏤᎦᏈ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᎩᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ, ᎤᎸᏉᏔᏅ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏥᏌ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᏥᏕᏥᏲᏒᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏤᏣᏓᏱᎸᎩ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᏆᎴᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᎪᏗᏱ ᏧᏰᎸᏒᎩ.
050313.english: The God of Abraham, and of Isaac, and of Jacob, the God of our fathers, hath glorified his Son Jesus; whom ye delivered up, and denied him in the presence of Pilate, when he was determined to let him go.
050313.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi E-qua-ha-mi u-tse-li-ga, a-le E-si-gi u-tse-li-ga, a-le Tse-ga-qui u-tse-li-ga, U-ne-la-nv-hi di-gi-ga-yv-li-ge u-na-tse-li-ga, u-lv-quo-ta-nv u-we-tsi Tsi-sa, na-s-gi ni-hi tsi-de-tsi-yo-sv-gi a-le tse-tsa-da-yi-lv-gi a-ga-ta-hv Qua-le-di, na-s-gi u-we-go-di-yi tsu-ye-lv-sv-gi.

050314.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎡᏣᏓᏱᎸᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏅᏘ, ᎢᏥᏔᏲᎸᎩᏃ ᎤᏓᎸᎯ ᎡᏥᎧᏁᏗᏱ
050314.english: But ye denied the Holy One and the Just, and desired a murderer to be granted unto you;
050314.phonetic: A-se-no ni-hi e-tsa-da-yi-lv-gi na-s-gi na-s-ga-nv-na a-le u-da-nv-ti, i-tsi-ta-yo-lv-gi-no u-da-lv-hi e-tsi-ka-ne-di-yi

050315.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᎡᏥᎸᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏕᎤᎴᏔᏅ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎣᏍᏗᏃᎮᏍᎩ.
050315.english: And killed the Prince of life, whom God hath raised from the dead; whereof we are witnesses.
050315.phonetic: A-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi gv-ni-dv a-da-ne-hi e-tsi-lv-gi, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi de-u-le-ta-nv u-yo-hu-sv-i, na-s-gi-no a-yv o-s-di-no-he-s-gi.

050316.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏙᎢ ᎤᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏔᏅ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᏥᎪᏩᏘᎭ ᎠᎴ ᏤᏥᎦᏔᎭ; ᎥᎥ, ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏃᏍᏛᏯ ᏄᏩᏁᎸ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎲ ᏂᎦᏛ.
050316.english: And his name through faith in his name hath made this man strong, whom ye see and know: yea, the faith which is by him hath given him this perfect soundness in the presence of you all.
050316.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi du-do-v go-hi-yu-di ge-sv nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-nv na-s-gi du-do-i u-li-ni-go-hi-s-ta-nv hi-a a-s-ga-ya, na-s-gi tse-tsi-go-wa-ti-ha a-le tse-tsi-ga-ta-ha; v-v, go-hi-yu-di ge-sv na-s-gi u-tse-li-ga hi-a u-no-s-dv-ya nu-wa-ne-lv i-tsi-ga-ta-hv ni-ga-dv.

050317.cherokee: Ꭷ ᎢᏓᏓᏅᏟ ᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᏂᏥᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᏣᏤᎵ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ.
050317.english: And now, brethren, I wot that through ignorance ye did it, as did also your rulers.
050317.phonetic: Ka i-da-da-nv-tli tsi-ga-ta-ha ni-tsi-ga-ta-hv-na ge-sv nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-nv na-s-gi ni-tsa-dv-ne-lv-i, a-le na-s-quo di-tsa-tse-li u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi.

050318.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎧᎵᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏗᏂᎰᎵ ᏥᏕᎬᏗᏍᎨᎢ.
050318.english: But those things, which God before had shewed by the mouth of all his prophets, that Christ should suffer, he hath so fulfilled.
050318.phonetic: Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni hi-a tsi-nu-li-s-ta-nv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ka-li-lv na-s-gi ga-yu-la gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-wa-ne-lv-hi tsi-ge-se-i Ga-lo-ne-dv u-gi-li-yo-i-s-di-yi, ni-ga-dv tsu-tse-li a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi di-ni-ho-li tsi-de-gv-di-s-ge-i.

050319.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᏁᏟᏴᎾ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᎦᏔᎲᎾ, ᎤᏓᏅᎦᎸᏗᏱ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏱ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ.
050319.english: Repent ye therefore, and be converted, that your sins may be blotted out, when the times of refreshing shall come from the presence of the Lord;
050319.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di di-tsi-ne-tli-yv-na de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i, a-le i-tsa-ga-ta-hv-na, u-da-nv-ga-lv-di-yi i-tsi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i, na-s-gi o-s-dv a-da-nv-da-di-s-di ge-sv u-na-nu-go-i-s-di-yi U-gv-wi-yu-hi-yi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi.

050320.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏅᏓᏳᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎡᏣᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ;
050320.english: And he shall send Jesus Christ, which before was preached unto you:
050320.phonetic: A-le nv-da-yu-nv-s-di-yi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, na-s-gi ga-yu-la e-tsa-li-tsi-do-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi;

050321.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏭᏕᏗ ᏥᎩ ᎬᏂ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎠᎵᏱᎶᎸᎭ ᎤᏓᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᎥᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᏨᎯ ᏥᎩ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎨᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎠᎾᏙᎵᎰᏍᎩ ᏗᏂᎰᎵ ᏧᏩᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎡᎶᎯ ᏧᏙᏢᏅᎢ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ.
050321.english: Whom the heaven must receive until the times of restitution of all things, which God hath spoken by the mouth of all his holy prophets since the world began.
050321.phonetic: Na-s-gi ga-lv-la-di wu-de-di tsi-gi gv-ni na-hi-yu a-li-yi-lo-lv-ha u-da-ne-tli-yv-s-di ge-sv ni-ga-v-i, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ne-tsv-hi tsi-gi tsu-tse-li ge-tsi-lv-quo-di a-na-do-li-ho-s-gi di-ni-ho-li tsu-wa-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi, e-lo-hi tsu-do-tlv-nv-i nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv.

050322.cherokee: ᎼᏏᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏕᎤᏪᏎᎴ ᏗᎩᏙᏓ; "ᏱᎰᏩ ᎢᏣᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏓᏥᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎵ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᎵᏅᏟ ᎨᏒ ᏓᎦᎾᏄᎪᏥ, ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᏰᏣᏛᏓᏍᏓᏁᎵ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎢᏥᏁᏤᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
050322.english: For Moses truly said unto the fathers, A prophet shall the Lord your God raise up unto you of your brethren, like unto me; him shall ye hear in all things whatsoever he shall say unto you.
050322.phonetic: Mo-si-ye-no hi-a ni-de-u-we-se-le di-gi-do-da; "Yi-ho-wa i-tsa-ne-la-nv-hi da-tsi-na-nu-go-wi-se-li a-do-le-ho-s-gi i-tsa-li-nv-tli ge-sv da-ga-na-nu-go-tsi, a-yv na-s-gi-ya-i; na-s-gi da-ye-tsa-dv-da-s-da-ne-li ni-ga-v i-tsi-ne-tse-di ge-sv-i.

050323.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᏂᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᎠᏥᏛᏙᏗ ᎠᎨᎳᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏑᏴ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ."
050323.english: And it shall come to pass, that every soul, which will not hear that prophet, shall be destroyed from among the people.
050323.phonetic: Hi-a-no nv-da-ga-li-s-ta-ni na-s-gi gi-lo ni-go-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-na i-ge-se-s-di na-s-gi a-do-le-ho-s-gi, a-tsi-dv-do-di a-ge-la-di-s-di ge-se-s-di u-da-su-yv yv-wi a-ne-hv-i."

050324.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏌᎻ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏂ ᎤᏂᎾᏄᎪᏨᎯ, ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᏂᏬᏂᏒᎯ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏂᏁᎢᏍᏔᏅ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
050324.english: Yea, and all the prophets from Samuel and those that follow after, as many as have spoken, have likewise foretold of these days.
050324.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo ni-ga-dv a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi Sa-mi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-dv, na-s-gi o-ni u-ni-na-nu-go-tsv-hi, na-ni-v u-ni-wo-ni-sv-hi, na-s-quo u-ni-ne-i-s-ta-nv go-hi ge-sv-i.

050325.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏧᏁᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᎩᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏚᏚᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ; "ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᏣᏁᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏔᏂ ᏄᎾᏓᎴᏒ ᏴᏫ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ."
050325.english: Ye are the children of the prophets, and of the covenant which God made with our fathers, saying unto Abraham, And in thy seed shall all the kindreds of the earth be blessed.
050325.phonetic: Ni-hi a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi tsu-ne-tsi, a-le na-s-quo tsu-we-tsi a-du-i-s-dv-i, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi di-gi-ga-yv-li-ge du-du-i-s-da-ne-lv-i, hi-a tsi-nu-we-se-le E-qua-ha-mi; "A-le ni-hi tsa-ne-tlv-ta-nv-hi ge-sv nv-da-ga-li-s-do-ta-ni nu-na-da-le-sv yv-wi e-lo-hi a-ne-hi o-si-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di ge-se-s-di."

050326.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏥᏌ, ᏂᎯ ᎢᏤᎲ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎤᏅᏒᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᏕᏥᎦᏔᎲᏍᎬ ᏗᏥᏲᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᏨᏁᎲ ᏂᏥᎥ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ.
050326.english: Unto you first God, having raised up his Son Jesus, sent him to bless you, in turning away every one of you from his iniquities.
050326.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi, u-na-nu-go-wi-sv u-we-tsi Tsi-sa, ni-hi i-tse-hv i-gv-yi u-nv-sv-gi o-s-dv i-tsa-dv-ne-di-yi de-tsi-ga-ta-hv-s-gv di-tsi-yo-hi-s-di-yi ni-tsv-ne-hv ni-tsi-v i-tsi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i.

050401.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏉᏃ ᏓᏂᏬᏁᏗᏍᎨ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᏚᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏌᏚᏏ ᎬᏩᏂᏃᎴᎢ;
050401.english: And as they spake unto the people, the priests, and the captain of the temple, and the Sadducees, came upon them,
050401.phonetic: A-si-quo-no da-ni-wo-ne-di-s-ge yv-wi, a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le o-s-dv i-yu-wa-hna-de-gi u-dv-nv--di-du-la-wi-i-s-di-yi a-le A-ni-sa-du-si gv-wa-ni-no-le-i;

050402.cherokee: ᎤᏥᏐᏅᏤᎮ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᏓᏁᏲᎲᏍᎬ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏌ ᎠᏅᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᎾᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎬ ᎠᏲᎱᏒ ᏗᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
050402.english: Being grieved that they taught the people, and preached through Jesus the resurrection from the dead.
050402.phonetic: U-tsi-so-nv-tse-he nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge da-ne-yo-hv-s-gv yv-wi, a-le Tsi-sa a-nv-di-s-gv a-na-li-tsi-do-hv-s-gv a-yo-hu-sv di-le-hi-so-di ge-sv-i.

050403.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏕᎬᏩᏂᏂᏴᎨ ᎠᎴ ᏕᎬᏩᏂᏍᏚᏁ ᎤᎩᏨᏛ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ, ᎿᎭᏉᏰᏃ ᎤᏒᎢ ᎨᏎᎢ.
050403.english: And they laid hands on them, and put them in hold unto the next day: for it was now eventide.
050403.phonetic: A-le de-gv-wa-ni-ni-yv-ge a-le de-gv-wa-ni-s-du-ne u-gi-tsv-dv i-go-hi-dv, hna-quo-ye-no u-sv-i ge-se-i.

050404.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏂᏣᏖ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎯᏍᎩᎭ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎾᏂᎡᎢ.
050404.english: Howbeit many of them which heard the word believed; and the number of the men was about five thousand.
050404.phonetic: A-se-no u-ni-tsa-te ka-no-he-dv u-na-dv-ga-nv-hi u-no-hi-yu-ne-i, na-s-gi-no a-ni-s-ga-ya hi-s-gi-ha i-ya-ga-yv-li na-ni-e-i.

050405.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁ ᎤᎩᏨᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏧᎾᏤᎵ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎳᏫᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ,
050405.english: And it came to pass on the morrow, that their rulers, and elders, and scribes,
050405.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne u-gi-tsv-dv, na-s-gi u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi tsu-na-tse-li a-le di-ni-la-wi-gi a-le di-no-we-li-s-gi,

050406.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎡᎾ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎧᏱᏆ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎵᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏧᏩᏅ ᏚᏂᎳᏫᏤ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ.
050406.english: And Annas the high priest, and Caiaphas, and John, and Alexander, and as many as were of the kindred of the high priest, were gathered together at Jerusalem.
050406.phonetic: A-le E-na nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi, a-le Ka-yi-qua a-le Tsa-ni a-le E-li-gi a-le ni-ga-dv nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi go-hu-s-di tsu-wa-nv du-ni-la-wi-tse Tsi-lu-si-li-mi.

050407.cherokee: ᎠᏰᎵᏃ ᏚᏂᎧᏅ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎ ᏚᎾᏛᏛᏁᎢ; ᎦᎪ ᎤᎵᏂᎬᎬᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪ ᎦᏙᎥ ᎢᏍᏛᏔᏅ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏍᏓᏛᏁᎸ?
050407.english: And when they had set them in the midst, they asked, By what power, or by what name, have ye done this?
050407.phonetic: A-ye-li-no du-ni-ka-nv hi-a nu-ni-we-se du-na-dv-dv-ne-i; Ga-go u-li-ni-gv-gv-i a-le ga-go ga-do-v i-s-dv-ta-nv, hi-a ni-s-da-dv-ne-lv?

050408.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏈᏓ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏎ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎢᏥᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏴᏫ ᏧᎾᏤᎵᎦ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏗᏥᎳᏫᏤᎯ,
050408.english: Then Peter, filled with the Holy Ghost, said unto them, Ye rulers of the people, and elders of Israel,
050408.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Qui-da u-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-se Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do, hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i; I-tsi-gv-wi-yu-hi yv-wi tsu-na-tse-li-ga a-le I-si-li di-tsi-la-wi-tse-hi,

050409.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏃᏍᏓᏛᏁᎸᎢ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏲᎤᎵ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ, ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏥᏅᏩᏅᎢ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ ᎢᎣᎩᎾᎵᏱᎵᏕᎮᏍᏗ,
050409.english: If we this day be examined of the good deed done to the impotent man, by what means he is made whole;
050409.phonetic: I-yu-no o-s-dv no-s-da-dv-ne-lv-i hi-a a-yo-u-li a-s-ga-ya, i-yu-s-di gv-ta-nv-hi ge-sv a-tsi-nv-wa-nv-i nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di go-hi i-ga i-o-gi-na-li-yi-li-de-he-s-di,

050410.cherokee: ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎢᏏᎵ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎤᏙᎥ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᏤᎲᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛ ᏤᏣᏛᏅᎩ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏥᏕᎤᎴᏔᏅ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏩᏂᏌᏅ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏗᏩᏒᎯ ᏥᎦᏙᎦ ᏕᏥᎧᏅᎢ.
050410.english: Be it known unto you all, and to all the people of Israel, that by the name of Jesus Christ of Nazareth, whom ye crucified, whom God raised from the dead, even by him doth this man stand here before you whole.
050410.phonetic: I-tsi-ga-ta-he-s-di ni-ga-dv, a-le ni-ga-dv I-si-li a-ne-hi a-ni-ga-ta-he-s-di na-s-gi de-u-do-v Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv Na-se-li-di tse-hv-gi, na-s-gi da-da-hna-wa-s-dv tse-tsa-dv-nv-gi, U-ne-la-nv-hi tsi-de-u-le-ta-nv u-yo-hu-sv-i, na-s-gi nu-wa-ni-sa-nv hi-a a-s-ga-ya u-di-wa-sv-hi tsi-ga-do-ga de-tsi-ka-nv-i.

050411.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏯ ᏥᏥᏲᎢᏎᎸᎩ ᏗᏣᏁᏍᎨᏍᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏅᏏᏴ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏗ ᏥᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ.
050411.english: This is the stone which was set at nought of you builders, which is become the head of the corner.
050411.phonetic: Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni hi-a nv-ya tsi-tsi-yo-i-se-lv-gi di-tsa-ne-s-ge-s-gi; na-s-gi u-nv-si-yv nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-di tsi-nu-li-s-ta-nv.

050412.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎩᎶᎢ ᎠᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏳᎭ, ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏕᎤᏙᎥ ᎦᎸᎶ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ.
050412.english: Neither is there salvation in any other: for there is none other name under heaven given among men, whereby we must be saved.
050412.phonetic: V-tla a-le nv-wa-da-le gi-lo-i a-li-s-de-lv-do-di ge-sv yu-ha, v-tla-ye-no nv-wa-da-le de-u-do-v ga-lv-lo ha-wi-ni-di-tlv yv-wi a-ne-hv a-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi yi-gi i-ga-li-s-de-lv-do-di.

050413.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᏒᏃ ᏈᏓ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂ ᎾᏂᏯᎦᎢᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏖᎸ ᎪᏪᎵ ᏂᏓᏂᏏᎾᏒᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎦᏔᎿᎭᎥᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏃᎵᏤ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏙᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
050413.english: Now when they saw the boldness of Peter and John, and perceived that they were unlearned and ignorant men, they marvelled; and they took knowledge of them, that they had been with Jesus.
050413.phonetic: U-na-do-le-ho-sv-no Qui-da a-le Tsa-ni na-ni-ya-ga-i-hv-na ge-sv-i, a-le u-na-da-nv-te-lv go-we-li ni-da-ni-si-na-sv-na a-le na-ni-ga-ta-hna-v-na ge-sv-i, u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-se-i, a-le du-no-li-tse na-s-gi Tsi-sa u-ne-do-lv-hi ge-sv-i.

050414.cherokee: ᎠᏂᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏃ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏥᏅᏩᏅᎯ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎠᏂᏙᎾᎡᎢ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏫᎬᏩᎾᏛᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ.
050414.english: And beholding the man which was healed standing with them, they could say nothing against it.
050414.phonetic: A-ni-go-wa-ti-s-ge-no a-s-ga-ya a-tsi-nv-wa-nv-hi i-tsu-la-ha a-ni-do-na-e-i, v-tla-no go-hu-s-di wi-gv-wa-na-dv-di yi-ge-se-i.

050415.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏚᏂᏁᏥᎸ ᎤᏂᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏓᏂᎳᏫᎥᎢ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᎵᏃᎮᎴᎢ,
050415.english: But when they had commanded them to go aside out of the council, they conferred among themselves,
050415.phonetic: A-se-no du-ni-ne-tsi-lv u-ni-nu-go-i-s-di-yi da-ni-la-wi-v-i u-nv-sv ge-sv u-na-li-no-he-le-i,

050416.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᎦᏙ ᏙᏓᏛᏁᎵ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ, ᏄᏜᏓᏏᏛᏒᎾᏰᏃ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏄᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᏴᎨᏓᏓᏱᎦ.
050416.english: Saying, What shall we do to these men? for that indeed a notable miracle hath been done by them is manifest to all them that dwell in Jerusalem; and we cannot deny it.
050416.phonetic: Hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; Ga-do do-da-dv-ne-li hi-a a-ni-s-ga-ya, nu-dla-si-dv-sv-na-ye-no u-s-qua-ni-go-di du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv gv-ni-ge-sv nu-na-li-s-da-ne-lv ni-ga-dv Tsi-lu-si-li-mi a-ne-hi, a-le v-tla ye-li yv-ge-da-da-yi-ga.

050417.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏧᏃᏣᎶᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ, ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛᏯ ᏗᏗᏍᎦᎩ ᏗᏗᏁᏥ, ᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎠᏂᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏂᏬᏁᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
050417.english: But that it spread no further among the people, let us straitly threaten them, that they speak henceforth to no man in this name.
050417.phonetic: A-se-no u-tli i-ga-i tsu-no-tsa-lo-i-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na yv-wi a-ne-hv-i, u-li-ni-gi-dv-ya di-di-s-ga-gi di-di-ne-tsi, go-hi i-yu-da-le-nv-dv hi-a na-s-gi du-do-v a-ni-ne-i-s-di-s-gv gi-lo u-ni-wo-ne-do-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na.

050418.cherokee: ᏫᏚᏂᏯᏅᎲᏃ ᏚᏂᏁᏤᎴ ᏥᏌ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎤᏅᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏁᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏕᏲᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
050418.english: And they called them, and commanded them not to speak at all nor teach in the name of Jesus.
050418.phonetic: Wi-du-ni-ya-nv-hv-no du-ni-ne-tse-le Tsi-sa du-do-v u-nv-do-di-yi u-ni-ne-i-s-di-yi a-le tsu-na-de-yo-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na.

050419.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏈᏓ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂ ᎤᏂᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏂᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᏚᏳᎪᏕᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏙᏗᎧᏂᏍᎬᎢ ᏂᎯ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎢᏨᏯᏛᏓᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᏗᏧᎪᏓ ᏂᎯ.
050419.english: But Peter and John answered and said unto them, Whether it be right in the sight of God to hearken unto you more than unto God, judge ye.
050419.phonetic: A-se-no Qui-da a-le Tsa-ni u-ni-ne-tsv hi-a ni-du-ni-we-se-le-i; I-yu-no du-yu-go-de-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi do-di-ka-ni-s-gv-i ni-hi u-tli i-ga-i i-tsv-ya-dv-da-s-da-ne-di-yi e-s-ga-quo U-ne-la-nv-hi, di-tsu-go-da ni-hi.

050420.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎦᏲᎩᏂᏰᎸᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎣᎩᏂᏁᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎣᎩᏂᎪᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᎩᎾᏛᎦᏅᎢ.
050420.english: For we cannot but speak the things which we have seen and heard.
050420.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no u-ne-la-gi ga-yo-gi-ni-ye-lv-di yi-gi, o-gi-ni-ne-i-s-do-di-yi nu-s-dv o-gi-ni-go-hv-i, a-le o-gi-na-dv-ga-nv-i.

050421.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏃ ᏙᎤᏂᏍᎦᏨ, ᏚᏂᎧᏁᎢ, ᎤᎾᏠᏤ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏩᏂᏍᏛᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏴᏫ, ᏂᎦᏛᏰᏃ ᎠᏂᎸᏉᏗᏍᎨ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎢ.
050421.english: So when they had further threatened them, they let them go, finding nothing how they might punish them, because of the people: for all men glorified God for that which was done.
050421.phonetic: A-si-no do-u-ni-s-ga-tsv, du-ni-ka-ne-i, u-na-tlo-tse go-hu-s-di gv-wa-ni-s-dv-di-s-di ge-sv-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge u-ni-tsa-ti yv-wi, ni-ga-dv-ye-no a-ni-lv-quo-di-s-ge U-ne-la-nv-hi, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge na-s-gi nu-li-s-ta-nv-i.

050422.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎦᏯᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᎢᏯᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎠᏥᏅᏩᏅᎯ ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏗ ᏅᎦᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᏱᎰᏎᎢ.
050422.english: For the man was above forty years old, on whom this miracle of healing was shewed.
050422.phonetic: A-s-ga-ya-ye-no na-s-gi u-s-qua-ni-go-di i-ya-gv-ne-lv-hi a-tsi-nv-wa-nv-hi u-lo-sv-s-di nv-ga-s-go-hi i-yu-de-ti-yv-dv yi-ho-se-i.

050423.cherokee: ᏕᎨᏥᎧᏅᏃ ᎤᎾᎵᎪᏅᎯ ᏗᏂᏅ ᏭᏂᎶᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏭᏂᏃᎮᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏂᎬᏩᏂᏪᏎᎸ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎳᏫᎩ.
050423.english: And being let go, they went to their own company, and reported all that the chief priests and elders had said unto them.
050423.phonetic: De-ge-tsi-ka-nv-no u-na-li-go-nv-hi di-ni-nv wu-ni-lo-se-i, a-le wu-ni-no-he-le ni-ga-v ni-gv-wa-ni-we-se-lv nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le di-ni-la-wi-gi.

050424.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ ᏌᏉ ᎢᎦᎦᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏂᏌᎳᏓᏁᎴ ᎠᏂᏁᎬᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏂᎯ ᏣᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᏗᏦᏢᏅᎯ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎺᏉᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏁᎯ;
050424.english: And when they heard that, they lifted up their voice to God with one accord, and said, Lord, thou art God, which hast made heaven, and earth, and the sea, and all that in them is:
050424.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no u-na-dv-ga-nv sa-quo i-ga-ga-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ni-sa-la-da-ne-le a-ni-ne-gv-i, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, ni-hi Tsa-ne-la-nv-hi, di-tso-tlv-nv-hi ga-lv-lo-i a-le e-lo-hi a-le a-me-quo-hi a-le ni-ga-dv na-hna a-ne-hi;

050425.cherokee: ᎯᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏕᏫ ᎠᎰᎵ ᏨᏔᏅᎯ ᎯᎠ ᎢᏣᏪᏛ ᏥᎩ; "ᎦᏙᏃ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏂᏔᎳᏬᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏖᎴ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏩᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
050425.english: Who by the mouth of thy servant David hast said, Why did the heathen rage, and the people imagine vain things?
050425.phonetic: Hi-nv-si-da-s-di De-wi a-ho-li tsv-ta-nv-hi hi-a i-tsa-we-dv tsi-gi; "Ga-do-no tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi u-ni-ta-la-wo-se-i, a-le yv-wi u-na-da-nv-te-le i-yu-na-dv-ne-di-yi na-s-gi i-gv-wa-li-s-do-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

050426.cherokee: ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ ᏚᎾᎴᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏚᏂᎳᏫᏨᎩ ᎠᎾᏡᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏡᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ."
050426.english: The kings of the earth stood up, and the rulers were gathered together against the Lord, and against his Christ.
050426.phonetic: U-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi e-lo-hi a-ne-hi du-na-le-nv-gi, a-le a-ye-li tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi du-ni-la-wi-tsv-gi a-na-tlu-di-s-gv U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-le a-na-tlu-di-s-gv u-tse-li Ga-lo-ne-dv."

050427.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯᏰᏃ ᎠᎾᏡᏗᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᏤᏥ ᏥᏌ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏧᎳ ᎡᎶᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏆᏂᏗ ᏆᎴᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏴᏫ ᏚᏂᎳᏫᏨᎩ,
050427.english: For of a truth against thy holy child Jesus, whom thou hast anointed, both Herod, and Pontius Pilate, with the Gentiles, and the people of Israel, were gathered together,
050427.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya-ye-no a-na-tlu-di-s-gv na-s-ga-nv-na tse-tsi Tsi-sa na-s-gi hi-lo-ne-dv i-tsu-la E-lo-dv a-le Qua-ni-di Qua-le-di a-le yv-wi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv a-le I-si-li yv-wi du-ni-la-wi-tsv-gi,

050428.cherokee: ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏦᏰᏂ ᎠᎴ ᎭᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎦᏳᎳ ᏗᏧᎪᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎨᏎ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
050428.english: For to do whatsoever thy hand and thy counsel determined before to be done.
050428.phonetic: I-yu-na-dv-ne-di-yi ni-ga-v tso-ye-ni a-le ha-da-nv-te-s-gv ga-yu-la di-tsu-go-ta-nv-hi tsi-ge-se na-s-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

050429.cherokee: Ꭷ ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎿᎭᏉ, ᏔᎧᏅᎦ ᎪᎩᏍᎦᎬ ᏣᏂᏁᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏔᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏏ ᏘᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎤᏍᏗᎤᏅ ᎾᏂᏍᎦᎢᎲᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏣᏁᏨ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ,
050429.english: And now, Lord, behold their threatenings: and grant unto thy servants, that with all boldness they may speak thy word,
050429.phonetic: Ka Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, hna-quo, ta-ka-nv-ga go-gi-s-ga-gv tsa-ni-ne-ga, a-le ta-li-s-go-lv-da-si ti-nv-si-da-s-di u-s-di-u-nv na-ni-s-ga-i-hv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi tsa-ne-tsv a-ni-no-he-s-gv-i,

050430.cherokee: ᎭᏙᏯᎯᏗᏍᎬ ᏕᎯᏅᏫᏍᎬᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏰᎸᏛᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎠᏅᏗᏍᎬ ᏕᎤᏙᎥ ᏥᏌ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᏤᏥ.
050430.english: By stretching forth thine hand to heal; and that signs and wonders may be done by the name of thy holy child Jesus.
050430.phonetic: Ha-do-ya-hi-di-s-gv de-hi-nv-wi-s-gv-i a-le u-ye-lv-dv-i a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv a-nv-di-s-gv de-u-do-v Tsi-sa na-s-ga-nv-na tse-tsi.

050431.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏅᏃ ᎤᎵᏖᎸᏁ ᎾᎿᎭᏓᏂᎳᏫᎥᎢ, ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏚᏂᎧᎵᏤ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᏍᎦᎢᎲᎾ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᎴ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
050431.english: And when they had prayed, the place was shaken where they were assembled together; and they were all filled with the Holy Ghost, and they spake the word of God with boldness.
050431.phonetic: U-na-da-do-li-s-ta-nv-no u-li-te-lv-ne na-hna da-ni-la-wi-v-i, ni-ga-dv-no du-ni-ka-li-tse Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do, a-le na-ni-s-ga-i-hv-na u-ni-no-he-le ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga.

050432.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏅᎯ ᏌᏉᏉ ᏄᏅᏁ ᏧᏂᎾᏫ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏓᏅᏙ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᏯᏗᏍᎨ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᎲᎢ, ᎠᏰᎵᏉᏰᏃ ᏄᏅᏁᎢ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ.
050432.english: And the multitude of them that believed were of one heart and of one soul: neither said any of them that ought of the things which he possessed was his own; but they had all things common.
050432.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no u-ni-tsa-ti ge-sv u-no-hi-yu-nv-hi sa-quo-quo nu-nv-ne tsu-ni-na-wi a-le tsu-na-da-nv-do; v-tla a-le gi-lo a-quv-sv a-qua-tse-li ya-di-s-ge go-hu-s-di u-hv-i, a-ye-li-quo-ye-no nu-nv-ne-i ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di.

050433.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳᏃ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨ ᎨᏥᏪᏍᎨ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᏅᏁᎲ ᏕᏅᎴᎯᏌᏅ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ; ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎨᎦᏓᏅᏖᏍᎨᎢ.
050433.english: And with great power gave the apostles witness of the resurrection of the Lord Jesus: and great grace was upon them all.
050433.phonetic: U-li-ni-gi-di-yu-no na-ni-we-s-ge ge-tsi-we-s-ge ge-tsi-nv-si-dv gv-ni-ge-sv na-nv-ne-hv de-nv-le-hi-sa-nv U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa; ni-ga-dv-no u-tsa-ti o-si-yu ge-ga-da-nv-te-s-ge-i.

050434.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᏳᏓᏑᏰ ᏳᏂᎬᎨᎢ, ᎾᏂᎥᏰᏃ ᎦᏓ ᎠᎴ ᏓᏓᏁᎸ ᏧᏂᎯ ᏚᏂᎾᏗᏅᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏂᎾᏗᏅᏛ ᏧᎬᏩᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏂᏲᎴᎢ,
050434.english: Neither was there any among them that lacked: for as many as were possessors of lands or houses sold them, and brought the prices of the things that were sold,
050434.phonetic: V-tla a-le gi-lo yu-da-su-ye yu-ni-gv-ge-i, na-ni-v-ye-no ga-da a-le da-da-ne-lv tsu-ni-hi du-ni-na-di-nv-se-i, na-s-gi-no u-ni-na-di-nv-dv tsu-gv-wa-la-nv-hi u-ni-yo-le-i,

050435.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏁ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᏧᎾᎳᏏᏕᏄᎶᏗ, ᎾᏂᎥᏃ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏂᏂᎬᏎᎲ ᎨᏥᏯᏙᎮᎮᎢ.
050435.english: And laid them down at the apostles' feet: and distribution was made unto every man according as he had need.
050435.phonetic: A-le u-ni-ne ge-tsi-nv-si-dv tsu-na-la-si-de-nu-lo-di, na-ni-v-no na-s-gi-ya u-ni-ni-gv-se-hv ge-tsi-ya-do-he-he-i.

050436.cherokee: ᏦᏏᏃ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᏆᏂᏆ ᏥᏚᏃᎡᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏛᎬ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎠᎵᏫ ᏌᏈ ᎤᏕᏅᎯ,
050436.english: And Joses, who by the apostles was surnamed Barnabas, (which is, being interpreted, The son of consolation,) a Levite, and of the country of Cyprus,
050436.phonetic: Tso-si-no ge-tsi-nv-si-dv Qua-ni-qua tsi-du-no-e-i, na-s-gi ga-dv-gv o-s-dv a-da-nv-da-di-s-di u-we-tsi, A-li-wi Sa-qui u-de-nv-hi,

050437.cherokee: ᎦᏓ ᎤᎮᎢ, ᎤᎾᏗᏅᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏚᏲᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎤᏁ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᏧᎾᎳᏏᏕᏄᎶᏗ.
050437.english: Having land, sold it, and brought the money, and laid it at the apostles' feet.
050437.phonetic: Ga-da u-he-i, u-na-di-nv-se-i, a-le a-de-lv du-yo-le-i, a-le na-s-gi de-u-ne ge-tsi-nv-si-dv tsu-na-la-si-de-nu-lo-di.

050501.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎡᏂᎾᏯ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ, ᎤᏓᎵᎢᏃ ᏌᏉᎵ ᎤᏂᎾᏗᏅᏎ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᎲᎢ,
050501.english: But a certain man named Ananias, with Sapphira his wife, sold a possession,
050501.phonetic: Gi-lo-no i-yu-s-di a-s-ga-ya E-ni-na-ya tsu-do-i-dv, u-da-li-i-no Sa-quo-li u-ni-na-di-nv-se go-hu-s-di u-ni-hv-i,

050502.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎯᏰ ᎢᎦᏛ ᏧᎬᏩᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᎦᏔᎮᎢ; ᎤᏲᎴᏃ ᎢᎦᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᏧᎾᎳᏏᏕᏄᎶᏗ ᎤᏁᎢ.
050502.english: And kept back part of the price, his wife also being privy to it, and brought a certain part, and laid it at the apostles' feet.
050502.phonetic: A-le u-hi-ye i-ga-dv tsu-gv-wa-la-nv-hi, a-le u-da-li-i na-s-quo a-ga-ta-he-i; u-yo-le-no i-ga-dv, a-le ge-tsi-nv-si-dv tsu-na-la-si-de-nu-lo-di u-ne-i.

050503.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎡᏂᎾᏯ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᏎᏓᏂ ᏣᎾᏫ ᎢᏣᎧᎵᎡᎸ, ᎯᏯᏥᎪᏁᏗᏱ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᎯᏯᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᎦᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏓ ᏧᎬᏩᎳᏅᎯ.
050503.english: But Peter said, Ananias, why hath Satan filled thine heart to lie to the Holy Ghost, and to keep back part of the price of the land?
050503.phonetic: Qui-da-no hi-a nu-we-se-i; E-ni-na-ya, ga-do-no Se-da-ni tsa-na-wi i-tsa-ka-li-e-lv, hi-ya-tsi-go-ne-di-yi Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do, a-le tsa-hi-ya-s-di-yi i-ga-dv na-s-gi ga-da tsu-gv-wa-la-nv-hi.

050504.cherokee: ᏥᏅᏩᏍᏛᏉ ᏝᏍᎪ ᏣᏤᎵᎦᏯ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ?  ᏣᎾᏗᏅᏃ ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏣᎮ ᎭᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᏉ ᎢᏨᏁᏗᏱ?  ᎦᏙᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎤᏍᏗ ᎢᏦᏢᏅ ᏣᎾᏫᏱ?  ᎥᏝᏍᎩᏂ ᏴᏫᏉ ᏱᎩᏯᏥᎪᏁᎸ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᏯᏥᎪᏁᎸ.
050504.english: Whiles it remained, was it not thine own? and after it was sold, was it not in thine own power? why hast thou conceived this thing in thine heart? thou hast not lied unto men, but unto God.
050504.phonetic: Tsi-nv-wa-s-dv-quo tla-s-go tsa-tse-li-ga-ya yi-ge-se-i?  Tsa-na-di-nv-no tla-s-go yi-tsa-he ha-da-nv-te-s-gv-quo i-tsv-ne-di-yi?  Ga-do-no hi-a na-s-gi ni-u-s-di i-tso-tlv-nv tsa-na-wi-yi?  V-tla-s-gi-ni yv-wi-quo yi-gi-ya-tsi-go-ne-lv, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni hi-ya-tsi-go-ne-lv.

050505.cherokee: ᎡᏂᎾᏯᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏛᎦᏅ ᎤᏅᏤ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏕᎴᎢ.  ᎾᏂᎥᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎢ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏂᎾᏰᏎᎢ.
050505.english: And Ananias hearing these words fell down, and gave up the ghost: and great fear came on all them that heard these things.
050505.phonetic: E-ni-na-ya-no na-s-gi u-dv-ga-nv u-nv-tse a-le u-li-s-qua-de-le-i.  Na-ni-v-no na-s-gi nu-li-s-ta-nv-i u-na-dv-ga-nv-hi u-tsa-ta-nv-hi u-ni-na-ye-se-i.

050506.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏫᏅᏃ ᏚᎾᎴᏁ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏄᎳᏁᎢ, ᎤᏂᎾᏫᏛᎲᏃ ᏭᏂᏂᏌᏁᎢ.
050506.english: And the young men arose, wound him up, and carried him out, and buried him.
050506.phonetic: a-ni-wi-nv-no du-na-le-ne a-le u-ni-tsa-nu-la-ne-i, u-ni-na-wi-dv-hv-no wu-ni-ni-sa-ne-i.

050507.cherokee: ᏦᎢᎭᏃ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎣᏂ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᎤᏴᎵᎴᎢ, ᎾᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎨᏎ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎢ,
050507.english: And it was about the space of three hours after, when his wife, not knowing what was done, came in.
050507.phonetic: Tso-i-ha-no i-yu-tli-lo-dv i-yv-dv o-ni u-da-li-i u-yv-li-le-i, na-ga-ta-hv-na ge-se nu-li-s-ta-nv-i,

050508.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏅᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏍᎩᏃᎲᏏ, ᏥᎪ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏕᏍᏓᎬᏩᎳᏁᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏙᎯ?  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎥᎥ, ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᎢᎦᎢ.
050508.english: And Peter answered unto her, Tell me whether ye sold the land for so much? And she said, Yea, for so much.
050508.phonetic: Qui-da-no hi-a ni-nv-we-se-le-i; S-gi-no-hv-si, tsi-go na-s-gi-quo i-ga-i de-s-da-gv-wa-la-ne-le na-s-gi ga-do-hi?  Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i; V-v, na-s-gi-quo i-ga-i.

050509.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏈᏓ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᏥᏍᏓᎵᎪᏅ ᎡᏍᏗᎪᎵᏰᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ?  ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏉ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᎳᏏᏕᏂ ᏣᏰᎯ ᎬᏩᏂᏌᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏂᎯ ᏛᎨᏣᎾᏫᏛᎯ.
050509.english: Then Peter said unto her, How is it that ye have agreed together to tempt the Spirit of the Lord? behold, the feet of them which have buried thy husband are at the door, and shall carry thee out.
050509.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Qui-da hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Ga-do-no tsi-s-da-li-go-nv e-s-di-go-li-ye-di-yi U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li A-da-nv-do?  Gv-ni-yu-quo a-quo ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi tsu-na-la-si-de-ni tsa-ye-hi gv-wa-ni-sa-nv-hi, na-s-gi-no ni-hi dv-ge-tsa-na-wi-dv-hi.

050510.cherokee: ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏧᎳᏏᏕᏄᎶᏗ ᎤᏅᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏕᎴᎢ.  ᎠᏂᏫᏅᏃ ᎤᏂᏴᎸ ᎤᏂᏩᏛᎮ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎢᎨᏎᎢ, ᎤᏂᎾᏫᏛᎲᏃ ᏭᏂᏂᏌᏁ ᎤᏰᎯ ᏫᎦᏅᎢ.
050510.english: Then fell she down straightway at his feet, and yielded up the ghost: and the young men came in, and found her dead, and, carrying her forth, buried her by her husband.
050510.phonetic: Gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv tsu-la-si-de-nu-lo-di u-nv-tse-i, a-le u-li-s-qua-de-le-i.  A-ni-wi-nv-no u-ni-yv-lv u-ni-wa-dv-he u-yo-hu-sv-hi i-ge-se-i, u-ni-na-wi-dv-hv-no wu-ni-ni-sa-ne u-ye-hi wi-ga-nv-i.

050511.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏂᎾᏰᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎠᎾᏛᎩᏍᎩ.
050511.english: And great fear came upon all the church, and upon as many as heard these things.
050511.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv u-tsa-ta-nv-hi u-ni-na-ye-se-i, a-le na-s-quo ni-ga-dv hi-a na-s-gi nu-li-s-ta-nv a-na-dv-gi-s-gi.

050512.cherokee: ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛᏃ ᎤᏣᏖ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ.  ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏌᏉ ᎢᎦᎦᏛ ᎠᏂᏁ ᏐᎵᎹᏅ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᏲᏓᏝᎲᎢ.
050512.english: And by the hands of the apostles were many signs and wonders wrought among the people; (and they were all with one accord in Solomon's porch.
050512.phonetic: Ge-tsi-nv-si-dv-no u-tsa-te u-ye-lv-dv a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he yv-wi a-ne-hv-i.  Ni-ga-dv-no sa-quo i-ga-ga-dv a-ni-ne So-li-ma-nv u-tse-li a-yo-da-tla-hv-i.

050513.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏐᎢᏃ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎢᎮ ᎬᏩᎾᎵᎪᏁᏗᏱ; ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏍᎩᏂ ᏴᏫ ᎬᏩᏂᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᎢ.
050513.english: And of the rest durst no man join himself to them: but the people magnified them.
050513.phonetic: A-ni-so-i-no a-ni-s-ga-i-he gv-wa-na-li-go-ne-di-yi; u-ni-tsa-ti-s-gi-ni yv-wi gv-wa-ni-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-i.

050514.cherokee: ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏟ ᏂᎦᎡ ᎬᏩᏁᏉᏤᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎤᏂᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏎ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ.
050514.english: And believers were the more added to the Lord, multitudes both of men and women.)
050514.phonetic: A-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi-no u-tli ni-ga-e gv-wa-ne-quo-tse-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi, u-ni-tsa-ta-nv-hi ge-se a-ni-s-ga-ya a-le a-ni-ge-yv.

050515.cherokee: ᏚᏜᏓᏅᏛᏰᏃ ᏓᏂᏃᎯᎮ ᏧᏂᏢᎩ, ᏗᏤᏍᏙ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᏂᏟ ᏓᏂᏢᏗᏍᎨᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᏩᏗᏍᏛᏉ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏈᏓ ᎠᎢᏒᎢ ᎢᎦᏛ ᎤᏄᏢᏙᏗᏱ.
050515.english: Insomuch that they brought forth the sick into the streets, and laid them on beds and couches, that at the least the shadow of Peter passing by might overshadow some of them.
050515.phonetic: Du-dla-nv-dv-ye-no da-ni-no-hi-he tsu-ni-tlv-gi, di-tse-s-do a-le di-ga-ni-tli da-ni-tlv-di-s-ge-i na-s-gi u-da-wa-di-s-dv-quo na-s-quo Qui-da a-i-sv-i i-ga-dv u-nu-tlv-do-di-yi.

050516.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉᏃ ᎤᏂᏣᏖ ᏕᎦᏚᏩᏗᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏂᎶᏒᎯ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎠᏂᎷᎨᎢ, ᏓᎾᏖᏃᎯᎮ ᏧᏂᏢᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᎬᏩᏂᏱᎵᏙᎯ; ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏕᎨᏥᏅᏩᏁᎢ.
050516.english: There came also a multitude out of the cities round about unto Jerusalem, bringing sick folks, and them which were vexed with unclean spirits: and they were healed every one.
050516.phonetic: Na-s-quo-no u-ni-tsa-te de-ga-du-wa-di-sv nv-da-yu-ni-lo-sv-hi Tsi-lu-si-li-mi a-ni-lu-ge-i, da-na-te-no-hi-he tsu-ni-tlv-gi a-le a-ni-s-gi-na gv-wa-ni-yi-li-do-hi; ni-ga-dv-no de-ge-tsi-nv-wa-ne-i.

050517.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᏚᎴᏅ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎬᏩᎵᎪᏁᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏌᏚᏏ ᏧᎾᏙᎢᏛ ᏥᎩ, ᎤᏂᎧᎵᏤ ᎤᏂᏔᎳᏬᏍᎬᎢ;
050517.english: Then the high priest rose up, and all they that were with him, (which is the sect of the Sadducees,) and were filled with indignation,
050517.phonetic: Hna-quo-no nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi du-le-nv a-le ni-ga-dv gv-wa-li-go-ne-hi, na-s-gi A-ni-sa-du-si tsu-na-do-i-dv tsi-gi, u-ni-ka-li-tse u-ni-ta-la-wo-s-gv-i;

050518.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏚᏂᏂᏴᎮ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ ᏚᏂᏴᏔᏁᎢ.
050518.english: And laid their hands on the apostles, and put them in the common prison.
050518.phonetic: A-le du-ni-ni-yv-he ge-tsi-nv-si-dv a-le di-da-s-du-di-yi du-ni-yv-ta-ne-i.

050519.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᏒᏃᏱ ᏚᏍᏚᎢᏎ ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᏚᏄᎪᏫᏒᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ;
050519.english: But the angel of the Lord by night opened the prison doors, and brought them forth, and said,
050519.phonetic: A-se-no di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li-ga sv-no-yi du-s-du-i-se di-da-s-du-di-yi ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi, du-nu-go-wi-sv-no hi-a nu-we-se-i;

050520.cherokee: ᎢᏤᎾ, ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏫᏣᎴᎲᎦ ᎠᎴ ᏫᏗᏥᏬᏁᏓ ᏴᏫ ᏫᏗᏥᏃᎲᏏ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ.
050520.english: Go, stand and speak in the temple to the people all the words of this life.
050520.phonetic: I-tse-na, u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi wi-tsa-le-hv-ga a-le wi-di-tsi-wo-ne-da yv-wi wi-di-tsi-no-hv-si ni-ga-dv ka-no-he-dv hi-a na-s-gi gv-ni-dv u-gv-wa-li.

050521.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ ᎩᎳ ᏧᎩᏥᏍᎪᎢ ᏭᏂᏴᎴ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᏚᎾᏕᏲᏁᎢ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎤᎷᏨ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᎵᎪᏁᎯ, ᏚᏂᏟᏌᏁ ᏗᏂᎳᏫᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏧᎾᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏫᏓᏯᏅᎲ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏎ ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ.
050521.english: And when they heard that, they entered into the temple early in the morning, and taught. But the high priest came, and they that were with him, and called the council together, and all the senate of the children of Israel and sent to the prison to have them brought.
050521.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no u-na-dv-ga-nv gi-la tsu-gi-tsi-s-go-i wu-ni-yv-le u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi a-le du-na-de-yo-ne-i.  A-se-no nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi u-lu-tsv, a-le na-s-gi gv-wa-li-go-ne-hi, du-ni-tli-sa-ne di-ni-la-wi-gi, a-le ni-ga-dv nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi I-si-li tsu-we-tsi tsu-na-tse-li-ga, a-le wi-da-ya-nv-hv u-na-da-nv-se di-da-s-du-di-yi.

050522.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏗᎾᏓᏂᏱᏍᎩ ᏭᏂᎷᏨ ᏫᏚᎾᏠᏤ ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ, ᏗᎤᎾᏨᏒᏃ ᎤᏂᏃᏁᎢ,
050522.english: But when the officers came, and found them not in the prison, they returned, and told,
050522.phonetic: A-se-no di-na-da-ni-yi-s-gi wu-ni-lu-tsv wi-du-na-tlo-tse di-da-s-du-di-yi, di-u-na-tsv-sv-no u-ni-no-ne-i,

050523.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎣᎩᏩᏛᎲ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎠᏍᏚᎲᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎦᏘᏯ ᎠᏂᏙᎾᎥ ᏙᏱᏗᏢ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏳᎶᏗ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎣᎩᏍᏚᎢᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏲᏥᏩᏛᎮ ᏱᏯᎡᎢ.
050523.english: Saying, The prison truly found we shut with all safety, and the keepers standing without before the doors: but when we had opened, we found no man within.
050523.phonetic: Hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; Di-da-s-du-di-yi u-do-hi-yu-hi o-gi-wa-dv-hv u-li-ni-gi-di-yu a-s-du-hv-gi, a-le a-ni-ga-ti-ya a-ni-do-na-v do-yi-di-tlv ga-lo-hi-s-di-yu-lo-di, a-se-no o-gi-s-du-i-sv v-tla gi-lo yo-tsi-wa-dv-he yi-ya-e-i.

050524.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏖᏔᏁᎢ, ᎭᏢ ᏮᏛᏍᏗᏥ ᎯᎠ, ᎤᏁᎵᏎᎢ.
050524.english: Now when the high priest and the captain of the temple and the chief priests heard these things, they doubted of them whereunto this would grow.
050524.phonetic: Hna-quo-no a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi a-le o-s-dv i-yu-wa-hna-de-gi u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi, na-s-gi hi-a nu-ni-we-sv u-na-dv-ga-nv, na-s-gi u-na-da-nv-te-ta-ne-i, Ha-tlv wv-dv-s-di-tsi hi-a, u-ne-li-se-i.

050525.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎤᎷᏤ ᎤᏂᏃᏁᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ ᏥᏕᏥᏴᏔᏅᎩ ᎠᏂᏯᎠ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᏂᏙᎾᎠ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏁᏲᎲᏍᎦ ᏴᏫ.
050525.english: Then came one and told them, saying, Behold, the men whom ye put in prison are standing in the temple, and teaching the people.
050525.phonetic: Hna-quo-no gi-lo u-lu-tse u-ni-no-ne-le hi-a nu-we-se-i; Gv-ni-yu-quo na-s-gi a-ni-s-ga-ya di-da-s-du-di-yi tsi-de-tsi-yv-ta-nv-gi a-ni-ya-a u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-ni-do-na-a, a-le da-ne-yo-hv-s-ga yv-wi.

050526.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎾᏓᏂᏱᏍᎩ ᎬᏍᎦᎢᏍᏓᎩ ᏂᏚᏅᏁᎸᎾ ᏫᏚᏂᏯᏅᎮᎢ; ᏓᏂᏍᎦᎢᎮᏰᏃ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ, ᏅᏯ ᏱᏕᎪᎬᏂᏍᏓ ᎠᏁᎵᏍᎨᎢ.
050526.english: Then went the captain with the officers, and brought them without violence: for they feared the people, lest they should have been stoned.
050526.phonetic: Hna-quo-no o-s-dv i-yu-wa-hna-de-gi a-le di-na-da-ni-yi-s-gi gv-s-ga-i-s-da-gi ni-du-nv-ne-lv-na wi-du-ni-ya-nv-he-i; da-ni-s-ga-i-he-ye-no u-ni-tsa-ti, nv-ya yi-de-go-gv-ni-s-da a-ne-li-s-ge-i.

050527.cherokee: ᏚᎾᏘᏃᎸᏃ ᏕᎦᎳᏫᎥ ᎢᎬᏱᏗᏢ ᏑᏂᎧᏁᎢ.  ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᏚᏛᏛᏁᎢ,
050527.english: And when they had brought them, they set them before the council: and the high priest asked them,
050527.phonetic: Du-na-ti-no-lv-no de-ga-la-wi-v i-gv-yi-di-tlv su-ni-ka-ne-i.  Nu-gv-wi-yu-sv-no a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi du-dv-dv-ne-i,

050528.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᏝᏍᎪ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛᏯ ᏱᏨᏅᏍᏓᏕᎴ ᏗᏣᏕᏲᏗᏱ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎤᏙᎥ ᎢᏨᏙᏗᏱ?  ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᏕᏣᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎢᏥᎧᎵᎢᏍᏔᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᎩᎬ ᎣᎩᏍᏛᏗᏍᏗᏱ, ᎢᏥᏰᎸᎭ.
050528.english: Saying, Did not we straitly command you that ye should not teach in this name? and, behold, ye have filled Jerusalem with your doctrine, and intend to bring this man's blood upon us.
050528.phonetic: Hi-a nu-we-se-i; Tla-s-go u-li-ni-gi-dv-ya yi-tsv-nv-s-da-de-le di-tsa-de-yo-di-yi hi-a na-s-gi de-u-do-v i-tsv-do-di-yi?  Gv-ni-yu-quo-no de-tsa-de-yo-hv-s-gv Tsi-lu-si-li-mi i-tsi-ka-li-i-s-ta-nv, a-le na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya u-gi-gv o-gi-s-dv-di-s-di-yi, i-tsi-ye-lv-ha.

050529.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎤᏂᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎣᏦᎯᏳᏗ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᏴᏫ.
050529.english: Then Peter and the other apostles answered and said, We ought to obey God rather than men.
050529.phonetic: Qui-da-no a-le ge-tsi-nv-si-dv u-ni-ne-tsv hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; U-ne-la-nv-hi o-tso-hi-yu-di, v-tla-no yv-wi.

050530.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᎩᏙᏓ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ ᏕᎤᎴᏔᏅ ᏥᏌ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᏥᎸᎩ ᎨᏛ ᏤᏣᏛᏅᎩ.
050530.english: The God of our fathers raised up Jesus, whom ye slew and hanged on a tree.
050530.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi di-gi-do-da u-na-tse-li-ga de-u-le-ta-nv Tsi-sa, na-s-gi tse-tsi-lv-gi ge-dv tse-tsa-dv-nv-gi.

050531.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏌᎳᏓᏅ ᎠᎦᏘᏏ ᎤᏬᏰᏂ ᎤᏩᏔᏅ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎢᏏᎵ ᏧᏁᏗᏱ ᏧᏂᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎨᏥᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ.
050531.english: Him hath God exalted with his right hand to be a Prince and a Saviour, for to give repentance to Israel, and forgiveness of sins.
050531.phonetic: Na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-sa-la-da-nv a-ga-ti-si u-wo-ye-ni u-wa-ta-nv, U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-le A-da-s-de-li-s-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, I-si-li tsu-ne-di-yi tsu-ni-ne-tli-yv-s-di-yi du-na-da-nv-dv-i, a-le ga-ge-tsi-ne-di-yi u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-i.

050532.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏃ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎣᏥᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ.
050532.english: And we are his witnesses of these things; and so is also the Holy Ghost, whom God hath given to them that obey him.
050532.phonetic: A-yv-no tsu-tse-li o-tsi-no-he-s-gi na-s-gi hi-a nu-s-dv-i, a-le na-s-quo Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi gv-wo-hi-yu-hv-s-gi.

050533.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ ᏚᏂᏘᎴ ᏧᏂᎾᏫᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏱᎵᏙᎴᎢ.
050533.english: When they heard that, they were cut to the heart, and took counsel to slay them.
050533.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no u-na-dv-ga-nv du-ni-ti-le tsu-ni-na-wi-yi, a-le tsu-ni-hi-s-di-yi u-ni-yi-li-do-le-i.

050534.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏕᎦᎳᏫᎥᎢ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏚᎴᏁ ᎠᏆᎵᏏ ᎨᎺᎵ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏗᎪᏏᏏᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ ᎬᏩᎸᏉᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᏤ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᏞᎦ ᏧᏂᎧᎲᏍᏗᏱ.
050534.english: Then stood there up one in the council, a Pharisee, named Gamaliel, a doctor of the law, had in reputation among all the people, and commanded to put the apostles forth a little space;
050534.phonetic: Hna-quo-no de-ga-la-wi-v-i gi-lo i-yu-s-di du-le-ne A-qua-li-si Ge-me-li tsu-do-i-dv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di di-go-si-si-s-gi na-ni-v yv-wi gv-wa-lv-quo-di, a-le u-ne-tse ge-tsi-nv-si-dv tle-ga tsu-ni-ka-hv-s-di-yi.

050535.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏯ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎢᏤᏯᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎢᏗᏳᏁᏗᏱ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ.
050535.english: And said unto them, Ye men of Israel, take heed to yourselves what ye intend to do as touching these men.
050535.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i; I-tsi-s-ga-ya I-si-li tsu-we-tsi i-tse-ya-ta-he-s-di nu-s-dv i-tsa-da-nv-te-s-gv i-di-yu-ne-di-yi hi-a a-ni-s-ga-ya.

050536.cherokee: ᎢᎸᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᏧᎾᏄᎪᏤ ᏚᏓᏏ ᎩᎶ ᏧᏤᎸᏎᎢ, ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᏅᎩᏧᏈ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᏥᎬᏩᎵᎪᏁᎴᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᏥᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᏅᎯ ᏧᎾᏗᎦᎴᏲᏤ ᎠᎴ ᏥᏫᎬᏩᏂᏲᏥᏙᎴᏉ.
050536.english: For before these days rose up Theudas, boasting himself to be somebody; to whom a number of men, about four hundred, joined themselves: who was slain; and all, as many as obeyed him, were scattered, and brought to nought.
050536.phonetic: I-lv-hi-yu-ye-no tsu-na-nu-go-tse Du-da-si gi-lo tsu-tse-lv-se-i, a-ni-s-ga-ya nv-gi-tsu-qui i-yv-dv i-ya-ni-dv tsi-gv-wa-li-go-ne-le-i, na-s-gi tsa-tsi-le-i, a-le ni-ga-dv na-s-gi gv-wo-hi-yu-nv-hi tsu-na-di-ga-le-yo-tse a-le tsi-wi-gv-wa-ni-yo-tsi-do-le-quo.

050537.cherokee: ᎣᏂᏃ ᏧᎾᏄᎪᏤ ᏧᏓᏏ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎡᎯ ᏣᎾᏎᎵᏙᎮ ᎢᏳᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏴᏫ ᏥᏚᏘᎿᎭᏫᏛᎮᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᎤᏲᎱᏎᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᏅᎯ ᏧᎾᏗᎦᎴᏲᏤᎢ.
050537.english: After this man rose up Judas of Galilee in the days of the taxing, and drew away much people after him: he also perished; and all, even as many as obeyed him, were dispersed.
050537.phonetic: O-ni-no tsu-na-nu-go-tse Tsu-da-si Ge-li-li e-hi tsa-na-se-li-do-he i-yu-i, a-le u-ni-tsa-ti yv-wi tsi-du-ti-hna-wi-dv-he-i, na-s-gi-no na-s-quo tsi-u-yo-hu-se-i a-le ni-ga-dv na-ni-v gv-wo-hi-yu-nv-hi tsu-na-di-ga-le-yo-tse-i.

050538.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏗᏣᎵᏌᎳᏁᎸ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ, ᎤᎾᏁᎳᎩ ᏗᏤᎵᏏ, ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎠᎾᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᏴᏫᏉ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᏲᏥᏓᏍᏗᏉ;
050538.english: And now I say unto you, Refrain from these men, and let them alone: for if this counsel or this work be of men, it will come to nought:
050538.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, Tle-s-di di-tsa-li-sa-la-ne-lv hi-a a-ni-s-ga-ya, u-na-ne-la-gi di-tse-li-si, i-yu-ye-no hi-a a-na-da-nv-te-s-gv a-le du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv yv-wi-quo nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi i-ge-se-s-di, u-yo-tsi-da-s-di-quo;

050539.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᏴᎨᏥᏲᏍᏓ; ᏯᎵᎦᏚᏓᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏉ ᏤᏣᏟᏴᎡᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
050539.english: But if it be of God, ye cannot overthrow it; lest haply ye be found even to fight against God.
050539.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi i-ge-se-s-di, v-tla ye-li yv-ge-tsi-yo-s-da; ya-li-ga-du-da-gi-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi-quo tse-tsa-tli-yv-e-hi ge-sv-i.

050540.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᏁᎢ; ᏫᏚᏂᏯᏅᎲᏃ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏂᎵᎥᏂᎸ, ᏚᏂᏅᏍᏓᏕᎴ ᏥᏌ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎤᏂᏁᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏂᎧᏁᎢ.
050540.english: And to him they agreed: and when they had called the apostles, and beaten them, they commanded that they should not speak in the name of Jesus, and let them go.
050540.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no gv-wo-hi-yu-ne-i; wi-du-ni-ya-nv-hv-no ge-tsi-nv-si-dv a-le du-ni-li-v-ni-lv, du-ni-nv-s-da-de-le Tsi-sa du-do-v u-ni-ne-i-s-do-di-yi, a-le du-ni-ka-ne-i.

050541.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏄᎪᏤᏃ ᏕᎦᎳᏫᎥᎢ ᎠᎾᎵᎮᎵᎨ ᏰᎵ ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᎢᎬᏩᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎤᏙᎥ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏍᎬᎢ.
050541.english: And they departed from the presence of the council, rejoicing that they were counted worthy to suffer shame for his name.
050541.phonetic: U-ni-nu-go-tse-no de-ga-la-wi-v-i a-na-li-he-li-ge ye-li u-de-ho-hi-s-di i-gv-wa-na-li-s-da-ne-di ge-sv na-s-gi de-u-do-v nv-di-ga-li-s-do-s-gv-i.

050542.cherokee: ᏂᏚᎩᏨᏂᏒᏃ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᏓᏓᏁᎳᏗᏒ ᎾᏂᏑᎵᎪᎬᎾ ᎨᏎ ᏓᎾᏕᏲᎲᏍᎨ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎨ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ.
050542.english: And daily in the temple, and in every house, they ceased not to teach and preach Jesus Christ.
050542.phonetic: Ni-du-gi-tsv-ni-sv-no u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi a-le da-da-ne-la-di-sv na-ni-su-li-go-gv-na ge-se da-na-de-yo-hv-s-ge a-le a-na-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ge o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-gv-wa-li.

050601.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏃ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏣᏔᏅ, ᎠᏂᎪᎢ ᎤᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏬᏂᏍᎩ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏓᏃᏎᎮ ᎠᏂᏈᎷ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᏂᎨᎦᎦᏌᏯᏍᏛᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏧᎾᏤᎵ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᏧᏃᏑᎶᏨᎯ ᏂᏚᎩᏨᏂᏒ ᎠᏂᏯᏙᎯᎲᎢ.
050601.english: And in those days, when the number of the disciples was multiplied, there arose a murmuring of the Grecians against the Hebrews, because their widows were neglected in the daily ministration.
050601.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-no a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi u-ni-tsa-ta-nv, A-ni-go-i u-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di a-ni-wo-ni-s-gi go-hu-s-di da-no-se-he A-ni-qui-lu, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge ni-ge-ga-ga-sa-ya-s-dv-na ge-sv tsu-na-tse-li a-ni-ge-yv tsu-no-su-lo-tsv-hi ni-du-gi-tsv-ni-sv a-ni-ya-do-hi-hv-i.

050602.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᏫᏚᏂᏯᏅᎲ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏱᎦᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᏙᎩᏲᏍᎦ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏕᎦᏍᎩᎸᏃ ᏱᏙᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ.
050602.english: Then the twelve called the multitude of the disciples unto them, and said, It is not reason that we should leave the word of God, and serve tables.
050602.phonetic: Hna-quo-no ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv u-ni-tsa-ti a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi wi-du-ni-ya-nv-hv hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; V-tla du-yu-go-dv yi-ga-gi i-yu-no yi-do-gi-yo-s-ga U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li ka-no-he-dv de-ga-s-gi-lv-no yi-do-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha.

050603.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎢᏓᏓᏅᏟ, ᎢᏨᏒ ᎢᏣᏓᏡᎬ ᏗᏣᏑᏯᎩ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏥᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎾᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᏗᎦᏲᏥᏁᏤᏗ.
050603.english: Wherefore, brethren, look ye out among you seven men of honest report, full of the Holy Ghost and wisdom, whom we may appoint over this business.
050603.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, i-da-da-nv-tli, i-tsv-sv i-tsa-da-tlu-gv di-tsa-su-ya-gi ga-li-quo-gi i-ya-ni-dv a-ni-s-ga-ya o-s-dv ge-tsi-no-he-s-gi u-ni-ka-li-tsv-hi Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do a-le a-ni-ga-ta-na-i, na-s-gi hi-a tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi di-ga-yo-tsi-ne-tse-di.

050604.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎦᎯᎸ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏙᏓᏲᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ.
050604.english: But we will give ourselves continually to prayer, and to the ministry of the word.
050604.phonetic: A-yv-s-gi-ni ni-ga-hi-lv a-da-do-li-s-do-di ge-sv a-le ka-no-he-dv do-da-yo-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di.

050605.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎢ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏁ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏑᏰᏎ ᏍᏗᏫ, ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᏈᎵᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏉᎪᎳ ᎠᎴ ᎾᎨᎾ ᎠᎴ ᏔᎹᏂ ᎠᎴ ᏆᎻᎾ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎩ ᎥᏘᎣᎩ ᎡᎯ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᏧᎵᎪᏁᎸᎯ;
050605.english: And the saying pleased the whole multitude: and they chose Stephen, a man full of faith and of the Holy Ghost, and Philip, and Prochorus, and Nicanor, and Timon, and Parmenas, and Nicolas a proselyte of Antioch:
050605.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no nu-ni-we-sv-i o-si-yu u-ni-ye-lv-ne ni-ga-dv u-ni-tsa-ti ge-sv-i; a-le u-na-su-ye-se S-di-wi, a-s-ga-ya u-ka-li-tsv-hi u-wo-hi-yu-sv a-le Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do, a-le Qui-li-gi a-le Quo-go-la a-le Na-ge-na a-le Ta-ma-ni a-le Qua-mi-na a-le Ni-gi V-ti-o-gi e-hi A-ni-tsu-si tsu-li-go-ne-lv-hi;

050606.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎠᏂᏅ ᎢᎬᏱᏗᏢ ᏚᏂᎧᏁᎢ; [ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛᏃ] ᎤᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᏚᎾᏏᏔᏕᎢ.
050606.english: Whom they set before the apostles: and when they had prayed, they laid their hands on them.
050606.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no ge-tsi-nv-si-dv a-ni-nv i-gv-yi-di-tlv du-ni-ka-ne-i; [ge-tsi-nv-si-dv-no] u-na-da-do-li-s-ta-nv du-na-si-ta-de-i.

050607.cherokee: ᎧᏃᎮᏛᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎧᏁᏉᎨᎢ, ᎾᏂᎥᏃ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᏂᏁᏉᎨ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ, ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏃ ᎠᏥᎸᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏁ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
050607.english: And the word of God increased; and the number of the disciples multiplied in Jerusalem greatly; and a great company of the priests were obedient to the faith.
050607.phonetic: Ka-no-he-dv-no U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li ka-ne-quo-ge-i, na-ni-v-no a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi u-tsa-ti a-ni-ne-quo-ge Tsi-lu-si-li-mi, u-ni-tsa-ti-no a-tsi-lv-a-ne-lo-hi u-no-hi-yu-ne go-hi-yu-di ge-sv-i.

050608.cherokee: ᏍᏗᏫᏃ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏂᎬᎬ  ᎤᏣᏖ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ.
050608.english: And Stephen, full of faith and power, did great wonders and miracles among the people.
